title: Reddit Client Manager
description:
Novantro is a Reddit Marketing Agency helping B2B companies and agencies generate revenue from Reddit. We are a lean, founder-led team currently doing $50K in monthly revenue and growing fast. That means two things for you: your work has direct, visible impact on the business, and there is real room to grow into bigger roles as we scale.



You'll own day-to-day Reddit execution for our clients: creating posts and threads that rank in Google and get cited by ChatGPT, plus running client onboarding and review calls. You'll work directly under our Head of Reddit / Operations Manager and focus on shipping work, not setting strategy.



What you'll do



Write and publish Reddit content (posts, comments, threads) for client campaigns

Optimize that content to rank in Google and earn citations in ChatGPT / AI Overviews

Research subreddits, transactional keywords, and ranking opportunities before publishing

Run client onboarding calls set expectations, get inputs, kick off the engagement

Run recurring client review calls walk clients through rankings, traffic, wins, and next steps

Track performance and report results back to clients in a clean, repeatable format

Flag risks (removals, mod actions, account issues) to the Head of Reddit



What we're looking for



Active Reddit user who understands subreddit culture, rules, and the difference between content that gets upvoted vs. removed

Strong written English you can write like a real Redditor, not a marketer

Comfortable on video calls with B2B clients (onboardings and reviews)

Working knowledge of how Google ranks Reddit threads and what makes content quotable by ChatGPT



Bonus: experience with Reddit account warm-up, removal recovery, or keyword-ranking projects



Where this role can go

This is a high-leverage seat on a fast-growing team. Strong performers here have a clear path into senior roles as we scale for example:



Senior Reddit Manager owning strategy across a portfolio of clients and mentoring content producers

Account Lead owning the full client relationship, retention, and expansion revenue

Sales Lead moving into pitching and closing new B2B accounts



We promote from within. The ceiling is set by your output, not your start date.



Application Priority



To be considered first, fill out this application form with your Reddit experience and examples:




/forms/vrqta62g

title: Amazon KDP eBook + Paperback Formatting Assistant (One-Time Project)
description:
We’re hiring a freelance book formatter to prepare a finished 80,000-word novel for publishing on Amazon Kindle (eBook) and paperback print through KDP. This is a one-time project with a clear scope and timeline.



-What You’ll Do:



Format eBook (ePub or .docx) for Kindle



Format print interior (PDF) for paperback



Apply correct page sizing, spacing, headers/footers, and clickable TOC



Match formatting to U.S. market standards



-You’ll Be Given:



Final manuscript in Word or Google Docs



Examples of layout preferences



Author/book info for headers and title pages



* Flat Fee: $40–$60 USD

*  Payment via Wise or PayPal

* Deadline: 3–5 days from start



- To Apply:



Send a short intro message



Share 2–3 book formatting samples (screenshots or links)



List what formatting tools you use

title: Lead Nurture & Admin Assistant for Martial Arts Gym
description:
Job Title:

Lead Nurture & Admin Assistant for Martial Arts Gym (Part-Time, EST, GHL Experience Required)



About Us:

We’re Total Revolution Training Facility — a fast-growing, family-friendly martial arts gym in Lima, Ohio. We’re looking for a skilled, friendly virtual assistant to help us stay organized, follow up with leads, and grow our member base. Our typical members are families with children ages 4 to 12, so we value a warm, upbeat, and helpful communication style.



We need someone experienced in GoHighLevel (GHL) who’s ready to assist with day-to-day CRM tasks, social media posting, and lead nurturing. If you’re organized, proactive, and enjoy helping a small business grow, we’d love to meet you.



Key Responsibilities:



Respond to new leads using our pre-written SMS scripts inside GoHighLevel



Move leads through CRM stages (New > Booked > No Show > Trial > Enrolled)



Book trial appointments based on program type and parent availability



Follow up with no-shows and trials via text



Create and schedule basic
 and Instagram posts



Handle simple member tasks such as holds and cancellations (training provided for Spark and ZenPlanner)



Complete small admin tasks assigned via WhatsApp (example: send praise messages to parents)



Submit a short daily report summarizing tasks completed



Tools You'll Be Using:



GoHighLevel (required)



Google Sheets



 / Instagram



Spark Software (we will train)



ZenPlanner (we will train)



WhatsApp (for task communication)



Schedule & Availability:



Part-time to start: 3 to 4 hours per day, Monday through Friday



Working hours must be during 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST (we are flexible on the exact time)



This role may grow into full-time in the future if your performance supports the gym’s growth and helps us transition from our current ad agency



Please note: full-time is not guaranteed upfront, but it is possible based on results



Compensation:



$3 to $5 USD per hour depending on experience



Performance bonuses available for achieving goals or completing special projects



Examples include copying our website into GoDaddy or helping us reduce ad agency costs



Long-term raise potential based on contribution and reliability



What We’re Looking For:



Strong written English and friendly tone when messaging leads and parents



Neutral or very light accent preferred for occasional voice tasks



GoHighLevel CRM experience (must-have)



Reliable, detail-oriented, and eager to follow clear processes



Able to work during U.S. daytime hours consistently



Excited to grow with a positive, community-based business



To Apply:



Please include the following when applying:



A short introduction explaining why you’d be a great fit



A brief summary of your GoHighLevel experience or a screenshot



Your desired hourly rate and the EST hours you are available to work



We’re excited to work with someone who wants to grow with us long-term. Thank you for applying!

title: Lead Generation, Cold Calling & Appointment Setter
description:
Company: New World Digital Agency

Position: Lead Generation & Appointment Setter

Location: Remote

Trial Period: 2 months

Language: English required. French is an asset.



About the Role



New World Digital Agency is looking for a motivated and results-driven person to handle lead generation, cold calling, and appointment setting.



Your role will be to find potential business leads, contact them, qualify them, and book appointments with interested prospects.



Main Responsibilities

Generate new business leads

Research and qualify prospects

Make outbound cold calls

Contact business owners and decision-makers

Ask qualification questions

Book qualified appointments

Follow up with interested prospects

Update lead status and notes clearly

Compensation



For the first 2-month trial period, the compensation is performance-based:



500 CAD/month base pay

The base pay is activated once the agent reaches 20 qualified appointments per month

10 CAD per qualified appointment booked

15 CAD bonus if the deal is closed.



After the 2-month trial period, if the performance is good, the compensation becomes:



750 CAD/month fixed base pay

Plus commissions

Plus monthly performance bonuses

Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who is:



Comfortable with lead generation and cold calling

Confident speaking in English

Professional and polite with prospects

Organized and consistent

Able to follow a script

Good at updating lead notes and status

Motivated by results and commissions



Experience in lead generation, cold calling, appointment setting, sales, BPO, or call center work is a strong asset.

title: US Construction Estimator - Commercial Painting (Division 9)
description:
We are a US-based commercial paint contractor looking for a dedicated Estimator/Quantity Surveyor to handle our bidding pipeline. We aim to submit at least 10 high-quality commercial bids per month. You will be responsible for the full takeoff process and preparing the final bid summary.



Key Responsibilities:



Perform detailed digital takeoffs using Bluebeam Revu (required).



Review architectural plans, finish schedules, and project specifications (Division 09).



Calculate square footage for walls, ceilings, and linear footage for trim/base.



Identify substrates (drywall, CMU, metal deck) and special coating requirements.



Populate our Excel bid templates with quantities, labor hours, and material costs.



Maintain a "Bid Tracker" to ensure we never miss a deadline.



Requirements:



Preferred Degree in Civil Engineering or Architecture.



Minimum 2 years experience estimating for US/North American commercial projects.



Expertise in Bluebeam Revu (Tool sets, overlays, and legends).



Strong understanding of "Inclusions/Exclusions" in commercial contracts.



Ability to work [Your Time Zone] hours for at least 3 hours of overlap.



How to Apply:



Please start your application with the phrase "READY TO BID."



Attach a Sample Takeoff (Color-coded Bluebeam markup) and the matching Excel summary.



Briefly describe your experience with Division 9 (Finishes) projects.

title: Sales and Operations Coordinator
description:
About the Role

?We are a growing painting contracting business looking for a proactive, organized, and tech-savvy Virtual Assistant. You will be the "glue" that holds our sales and administrative processes together—ensuring our customers feel valued and our field team is ready to work.

etings to review performance, share learnings and improve as a team

title: Everything Assistant
description:
Looking for the VA who never needs to be asked twice.



I run a large operation and I need a right-hand person someone organized, sharp, and self-directed enough that I can hand off a task with a Loom video and trust it'll get done correctly the first time. No babysitting. No chasing.

This is an "Everything VA" role, which means social media and 
 are the core of what you'll do, but on any given day I might also ask you to organize a Notion database, clean up a Google Drive, draft an
, schedule something, or research a vendor. If I can record a Loom explaining it, you can do it.



What you'll be doing day-to-day:



- Running point on 
 — moderation, member onboarding, organizing channels, managing roles, working with bots, handling community questions

- Owning Notion docs, dashboards, and SOPs

- Keeping Google Drive organized and accessible

- Executing one-off tasks I assign via Loom (research, outreach, data entry, scheduling, vendor coordination, etc.)

- Flagging issues before they become problems



You're a fit if:



- You've actively used 
 for 2+ years and know your way around roles, permissions, bots (MEE6, Carl-bot, Dyno, etc.), and community management

- You have real social media experience — not just "I have a personal Instagram." You've grown or managed accounts and can show me what you've worked on

- You're available during US business hours (specify your timezone in the application)

- You're fluent in Notion and Google Drive and pick up new tools quickly

- You're obsessively organized — if your own files and tasks are a mess, this role will eat you alive

- You communicate proactively. You don't wait to be asked for status updates

- You can watch a Loom once and execute, then build an SOP from it so you never need to be told again

- Your written English is sharp



You're NOT a fit if:

- You need step-by-step hand-holding

- You go silent for hours during your work block

- You've juggled 5 other clients and "fit them in"

- You need every task to be perfectly scoped before you can start



To apply:

Fill out the intake form here: 



Read this carefully: The Secret hidden word is "banana" (lowercase, no quotes). Applications that skip this step won't be reviewed. I do this because I'm hiring for attention to detail, and if you can't follow a one-line instruction in the job post, you can't follow my Looms.

title: Call Center Agent Team Lead 11pm-8am PHT
description:
Job Description



We are hiring a full-time phone agent to handle inbound sales qualification calls during 11pm-8am PHT for our law firm intake center

We already have two agents from the Philippines successfully working in this position

You will report directly to me, I am from Canada.



Main Responsibilities



Answer inbound calls quickly during your shift

Ask the four qualification questions provided in the script

Follow the script closely and consistently

Quickly transfer qualified leads to a manager

Fill out a short Google Form with the caller’s information

Record each call/lead in the daily report

Stay active and responsive on Slack during your shift



Requirements

- Must have at least 2 yrs of call center experience

- Must have a headset with clear audio quality

- Must have a quiet room with minimal background noise

- Must have a reliable internet connection

- Must be live on Slack and responsive during your shift

- Must maintain a call pickup time of under 10 seconds throughout the shift



Ideal Candidate

- Women candidates preferred from a vocal quality, and empathetic phone voice perspective

- If you have worked as a Call Support Team Lead in the past, this experience is highly valued, mention in your recording.

- Reliable, consistent, and detail-oriented

- Able to follow instructions and stick to a script

- Has a professional phone presence



DO NOT APPLY UNLESS YOU MEET ALL THE REQUIREMENTS ABOVE



Breaks

- Two unpaid 30-minute breaks during your shift

- Breaks are for personal matters, meals, or rest

- Break timing should be coordinated so live call coverage is not affected



Success Metrics



Your success will be measured by:

- Number of successful transfers

- Number of calls answered

- Number of missed calls

- Accuracy of call notes and Google Form submissions

- The goal is to avoid missing any calls during the shift.



Average handling time and first-call resolution are not relevant for this position. The priority is answering calls quickly, qualifying leads accurately, and transferring qualified leads to a manager.



Next Steps

- To apply, please send a voice recording using 
 speaking about your previous call center work experience in less than 60 seconds. Please ensure you have clear audio quality and speak quality as I will be evaluating based on that.

- If you include any other message, please keep it short



Work

- I am looking to hire ASAP and will conduct interviews this week

- First round interview is a 15min roleplay with a script

- First day I will train you how to do the job with our call center software

- First 5 days are a paid trial to ensure you are able to the job

- After that I will pay you monthly via wise

title: AI Avatar Video Creator for Fast Growing Wellness Brand (Ongoing Ad Production)
description:
We are is a fast growing DTC beauty and wellness brand. Our hero product, Collagen Jelly Sticks, is in the middle of a major paid media push across Meta and TikTok, and we're scaling our creative output with AI generated avatar videos.



What You'll Do



You'll produce AI avatar videos that look and sound like high quality UGC ads. We'll provide briefs, scripts, and reference angles. You'll bring them to life using AI avatar platforms, voice generation tools, and finishing techniques that make the output feel native to social feeds rather than obviously AI.



Typical work includes:



Generating AI avatar videos using tools like HeyGen, Arcads, Captions AI, Hedra, Argil, Creatify, or Synthesia

Selecting or cloning voices (ElevenLabs or similar) that match the avatar and audience

Adapting our scripts into multiple hook and CTA variants for ad testing

Adding B roll, product shots, captions, music, and sound design to finish each video

Quality control on lip sync, pacing, and natural delivery so the ads don't feel robotic

Delivering in 9:16, 1:1, and occasionally 16:9, typically 15 to 60 seconds



Who You Are



Hands on experience producing AI avatar videos at volume, ideally for paid social ads

Strong opinions on which avatar platforms perform best for which use cases (and why)

Skilled with voice cloning and AI voice tools (ElevenLabs, PlayHT, or similar)

Comfortable in a finishing tool (CapCut, Premiere, DaVinci, or Final Cut) for B roll, captions, and polish

You understand direct response ad structure: hook, problem, solution, proof, CTA

Sharp eye for catching the small tells that make AI video look fake (and how to fix them)

Reliable turnaround (typically 48 to 72 hours per batch)

Comfortable working async via Slack, 
, or Google Drive



Bonus points:



Experience in beauty, wellness, or supplement DTC

Ability to write or rewrite hook variations from a base script

Familiarity with Meta and TikTok ad creative best practices



What We Offer



Ongoing work with consistent weekly volume (5 to 10 videos per week to start, with room to scale)

Clear briefs, written scripts, product footage, and direct founder feedback

Long term partnership for the right person, with first look at additional brand projects



To Apply

Please include:



Two or three examples of AI avatar videos you've produced (ideally for paid ads)

Your rate (per video or hourly) and typical turnaround

The word "jelly" at the top of your application so we know you read this carefully





Looking forward to seeing your work.

title: Assistant Property Manager
description:
Assistant Property Manager

Aoede LLC | 100% Remote | Full-Time



About the Role



The Assistant Property Manager is responsible for the day-to-day operations, support, and customer service of a growing, diversified real estate portfolio across Texas and California. This includes a 70-unit commercial building in Houston, TX, single-family rental properties in California, and short-term rental (Airbnb) properties in Austin, TX. This is a 100% remote, full-time, long-term position.



We do annual team bonding trips in the Philippines — if you're talented, hardworking, and ambitious, we'd love to meet you in person and talk about where your career is headed.



What You'll Do



- Direct and oversee daily operations across a mixed portfolio of commercial, single-family, and short-term rental properties

- Provide excellent customer service to all tenants, guests, and prospects

- Prepare and send communication notices to tenants

- Draft lease agreements and manage property documentation

- Coordinate maintenance requests and vendor communication across multiple property types

- Enter accounts receivable and accounts payable into QuickBooks

- Perform monthly bank reconciliations

- Ensure accuracy and timely preparation of all required reports

- Schedule tea
etings, coordinate via Zoom, and delegate tasks to tea
mbers

- Manage Airbnb listings, guest communications, and short-term rental operations



What We're Looking For



- 2+ years of property management experience

- Experience supporting US-based properties preferred

- Experience with any combination of commercial, residential, or short-term rental management is a plus

- Proficiency in QuickBooks

- Expert-level use of Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook)

- Familiarity with property management software (AppFolio a plus)

- Comfortable using Asana, Slack, and Zoom for daily communication

- Strong written and spoken English

- Detail-oriented, organized, and able to manage multiple priorities across different property types

- Bachelor's degree preferred

- Humble, coachable, and eager to learn US property management regulations (Section 8, rent control, tenant/landlord laws in California and Texas)



What We Offer



- 100% remote position — work from home

- Long-term role with real growth potential

- On-the-spot bonuses for high performers

- Raises considered at performance evaluations for those who master the training material and execute at a high level

- Extensive runbooks and tutorials to support your development

- Annual team bonding trips in the Philippines

- A team culture that values hard work, initiative, and continuous learning



---



Our Hiring Process



1. Apply — Submit your application with the details listed below

2. Initial Review — We review your experience and qualifications

3. Assessment — Qualified candidates receive a TestGorilla skills assessment (~1 hour, webcam required)

4. Interview — Candidates who score at or above the 50th percentile are invited to a Zoom interview

5. Offer & Onboarding — Successful candidates begin with a 3-month probation period with full training and support



---



Frequently Asked Questions



What types of properties will I manage?

You'll support a diversified portfolio that includes a 70-unit commercial building in Houston, single-family rental homes in California, and short-term rental (Airbnb) properties in Austin. This role gives you broad exposure across multiple property types.



What are the working hours?

You will be expected to work US Central Time business hours. This is a full-time position (40 hours/week).



How and when do I get paid?

Pay is on the 1st and 15th of each month via Wise (
).



Is this freelance or full-time?

This is a full-time, dedicated position. Freelancing or side work is not allowed. We need your full commitment.



Do you provide equipment?

You must have your own laptop, headset, and reliable high-speed internet connection.



Is there a probation period?

Yes, there is a 3-month probation period. After that, performance evaluations are conducted every 6 months.



How do raises and bonuses work?

We offer on-the-spot bonuses for exceptional work. Raises are considered at your 6-month performance evaluations based on how well you learn the training material and execute your responsibilities.



What training and support do you provide?

We have extensive runbooks, tutorials, and experienced tea
mbers to help you get up to speed. We invest in people who are willing to learn.



What software will I need to learn?

AppFolio (property management), QuickBooks (accounting), Asana (task management), Slack (communication), and Zoom (meetings). If you don't know all of these yet, that's okay — what matters is your willingness to learn quickly.



---



To Apply



Please include:

1. A brief summary of your property management experience

2. Which Western countries you've supported (if any)

3. What types of properties you've managed (commercial, residential, short-term rental)

4. What PM and accounting software you've used

title: Direct Response Video Editor (Meta Ads)
description:
Performance Video Editor (Meta Ads) – ELYVIA Skincare

Are you a Meta Ads expert who can blend cinematic B-roll storytelling, traditional UGC, and AI-assisted content into high-converting skincare creatives?



We are building ELYVIA, a premium UK-based skincare brand focused on innovative at-home infusion treatments. We don’t just sell products; we sell a new biological belief through education and high-impact direct-response marketing.



We are looking for a Creative Editor who understands that a winning ad is a mix of tight psychology, visual retention, and the ability to "show, not just tell."



ABOUT THE ROLE

This is not a basic "cut-and-paste" role. You will be responsible for turning detailed briefings into polished Meta ads. We need an editor who is a master of versatility:



Master the Scroll-Stop: Craft hooks that immediately stop our target audience (Women 40+) in their tracks using high-quality B-roll or UGC.



Versatile Content Creation: You must be able to build powerful ads using a mix of traditional UGC, cinematic B-roll, and AI-generated avatars/UGC when the script requires it.



Visualize the Mechanism: Use B-roll and animations to explain how ELYVIA  works.



Maintain ELYVIA Branding: Every ad must feel premium and credible. We want u to be able to make branded ads.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

Direct Response Editing: Create high-impact 9:16 video ads (VSL-style) focused entirely on performance and conversion.



Strategic Sourcing: We provide a base set of assets (B-roll & VO), but we expect you to source your own additional visuals to perfectly match the narrative and fill any gaps. 



All-Round Footage Handling: Whether it’s raw customer UGC, professional product shots, or AI-generated footage, you can weave it into a seamless story. 



Mechanism Animations: Source or create clean visuals that show our products, the more branded the better.



THE WORKFLOW & PAID TEST

We believe in clear direction but highly value own creativity. For every project, you will receive:



A Written Script (the narrative flow).



A Visual Briefing (Istructions on which visuals you can bind to the script).



A Voice-Over file.



A Base set of B-roll and assets.



Paid Test:

We start with a paid trial video. Since our scripts are comprehensive and focused on deep education, the test video will be over 60 seconds.



Fixed Test Fee: $10



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE

Proven experience editing Meta Ads, VSLs, or performance-driven UGC.



Expertise in sourcing high-quality B-roll that fits specific psychological triggers.



Proficiency in software like Premiere Pro, After Effects, DaVinci, or CapCut Pro.



Experience with AI video tools / AI UGC.



Ability to work independently and bring your own creative "flair" to a briefing.



We are specifically looking for someone who understands:



how to make the first 3 seconds scroll-stopping

how to keep visual pacing tight

how to make scripts easy to follow visually

how to source relevant B-roll

how to create visual contrast between “problem” and “solution”

how to edit before/after proof sections

how to use animations for mechanism explanation

how to make skincare ads look premium and credible

how to edit for Meta ads, not YouTube or long-form content



COMPENSATION & GROWTH

We are looking for a long-term partner, not a one-off freelancer.



Ongoing: Consistent weely workload as we scale.



Growth: Potential to grow into a Lead Editor role with performance-based bonuses for "Winning Creatives."



HOW TO APPLY

Send your Portfolio.



Which editing software do you use?



Ready to help us define the future of premium skincare? Apply now.



Kind regards,



David

title: Senior Assistant Property Manager
description:
Senior Assistant Property Manager

Aoede LLC | 100% Remote | Full-Time



About the Role



The Senior Assistant Property Manager is a leadership role responsible for overseeing the day-to-day operations of a growing, diversified real estate portfolio across Texas and California. This includes a 70-unit commercial building in Houston, TX, single-family rental properties in California, and short-term rental (Airbnb) properties in Austin, TX.



You will lead and supervise a team of Assistant Property Managers while personally handling complex operational, financial, and tenant matters. This is not an entry-level position — we need someone who has managed US properties, can make decisions independently, and is ready to own outcomes.



This is also not a role where you simply delegate and disappear. You need to be hands-on, involved in ongoing tasks, and ready to step in with guidance when a tea
mber needs it — or take over a task entirely when the situation calls for it. Our leadership philosophy is trust but verify: you empower your team to execute, then you follow up and confirm the work was done correctly.



This is a 100% remote, full-time, long-term position.



We do annual team bonding trips in the Philippines — if you're talented, hardworking, and ambitious, we'd love to meet you in person and talk about where your career is headed.



What You'll Do



Team Leadership

- Supervise and mentor Assistant Property Managers using a trust-but-verify approach — delegate clearly, follow up consistently, and confirm quality

- Stay hands-on with ongoing tasks — review work in progress, not just final outputs

- Step in to provide guidance, coaching, or direct support when tea
mbers are stuck or struggling

- Take over tasks when the situation requires it — no task is beneath you

- Apply project management principles to plan, track, and deliver property operations initiatives on time and within scope

- Schedule tea
etings, delegate tasks, and hold tea
mbers accountable for deadlines and quality

- Conduct training sessions using company runbooks and tutorials

- Serve as the first point of escalation for the team before matters reach ownership



Property Operations

- Oversee daily operations across a mixed portfolio of commercial, single-family, and short-term rental properties

- Ensure excellent customer service to all tenants, guests, and prospects

- Manage Airbnb listings, guest communications, and short-term rental operations

- Coordinate maintenance requests and vendor communication across multiple property types

- Ensure accuracy and timely preparation of all required reports



Tenant Relations & Legal

- Handle escalated tenant situations — complaints, disputes, and difficult conversations

- Prepare and serve legal notices (pay or quit, lease violations, cure or quit)

- Coordinate eviction processes with legal counsel and local authorities

- Ensure compliance with US property management regulations including Section 8, rent control, and tenant/landlord laws in California and Texas



Financial Management

- Participate in budget planning for properties across the portfolio

- Negotiate vendor contracts and pricing to optimize operational costs

- Set and review lease pricing based on market conditions

- Enter accounts receivable and accounts payable into QuickBooks

- Perform monthly bank reconciliations

- Monitor rent collections, track arrears, and escalate delinquencies



Documentation & Communication

- Draft lease agreements and manage property documentation

- Prepare and send communication notices to tenants

- Coordinate via Zoom, Slack, and Asana daily



What We're Looking For



- 2+ years of US property management experience (required — non-negotiable)

- Proven experience managing commercial, residential, or short-term rental properties in the US

- Understanding of Project Management (PMP) principles — you should be comfortable with scope management, task prioritization, risk identification, stakeholder communication, and delivering results on schedule. PMP certification is a plus but not required — what matters is that you think and operate like a project manager

- Experience leading and managing tea
mbers — you must have real examples of how you've delegated work, verified completion, coached tea
mbers through challenges, and stepped in to take over when needed

- A hands-on leadership style — you don't just assign tasks and walk away, you stay involved and ensure quality at every step

- Experience handling tenant escalations, legal notices, and eviction coordination

- Understanding of US property management regulations — Section 8, rent control, fair housing, and state-level tenant/landlord laws in California and Texas

- Proficiency in QuickBooks

- Expert-level use of Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook)

- Familiarity with property management software (AppFolio strongly preferred)

- Comfortable using Asana, Slack, and Zoom for daily communication

- Strong written and spoken English — you will be communicating directly with US tenants, vendors, and legal contacts

- Financially literate — comfortable with budgets, vendor negotiations, and lease pricing decisions

- Bachelor's degree preferred

- Dependable, proactive, and able to make sound decisions without constant oversight

- Must provide 3 work references from US-based individuals who can verify your US property management experience (this is required and will be checked before any offer is made)



What We Offer



- 100% remote position — work from home

- Long-term role with real growth potential into senior management

- On-the-spot bonuses for high performers

- Raises considered at performance evaluations for those who master the training material and execute at a high level

- Extensive runbooks and tutorials to support your development

- Annual team bonding trips in the Philippines

- A team culture that values hard work, initiative, and continuous learning



---



Our Hiring Process



1. Apply — Submit your application with the details listed below

2. Initial Review — We review your experience and qualifications

3. Assessment — Qualified candidates receive a TestGorilla skills assessment (~1 hour, webcam required)

4. Interview — Candidates who score at or above the 50th percentile are invited to a Zoom interview

5. Reference Check — We contact your 3 US-based references to verify your property management experience

6. Offer & Onboarding — Successful candidates begin with a 3-month probation period with full training and support



---



Frequently Asked Questions



What types of properties will I manage?

You'll oversee a diversified portfolio that includes a 70-unit commercial building in Houston, single-family rental homes in California, and short-term rental (Airbnb) properties in Austin. You'll also lead the team responsible for day-to-day management of these properties.



How is this different from the Assistant Property Manager role?

The Senior APM leads and supervises the APM team, handles escalated tenant situations and legal processes, and is involved in financial decisions including budgeting, vendor negotiations, and lease pricing. You are expected to operate independently and make sound decisions.



What leadership style are you looking for?

We believe in trust but verify. You delegate tasks to your team, trust them to execute, and then follow up to confirm the work was done correctly. But you're not just a manager — you're hands-on. You stay involved in ongoing tasks, provide guidance when tea
mbers need it, and take over tasks yourself when the situation requires it. If you're the type of leader who only gives orders from a distance, this role isn't for you.



Do I need a PMP certification?

PMP certification is a plus but not required. What we care about is that you understand and apply project management principles in your daily work — scoping tasks clearly, prioritizing effectively, identifying risks before they become problems, communicating proactively with stakeholders, and delivering results on time. If you naturally think this way, you'll thrive here.



What are the working hours?

You will be expected to work US Central Time business hours. This is a full-time position (40 hours/week).



How and when do I get paid?

Pay is on the 1st and 15th of each month via Wise (
).



Is this freelance or full-time?

This is a full-time, dedicated position. Freelancing or side work is not allowed. We need your full commitment.



Do you provide equipment?

You must have your own laptop, headset, and reliable high-speed internet connection.



Is there a probation period?

Yes, there is a 3-month probation period. After that, performance evaluations are conducted every 6 months.



How do raises and bonuses work?

We offer on-the-spot bonuses for exceptional work. Raises are considered at your 6-month performance evaluations based on how well you learn the training material, lead your team, and execute your responsibilities.



What training and support do you provide?

We have extensive runbooks, tutorials, and experienced tea
mbers to help you get up to speed on our specific processes. While we expect you to bring US property management knowledge, we'll train you on our systems and workflows.



What software will I need to know?

AppFolio (property management), QuickBooks (accounting), Asana (task management), Slack (communication), and Zoom (meetings). Proficiency in AppFolio and QuickBooks is strongly preferred for this role.



Why do you require US-based references?

We require 3 work references from US-based individuals to verify your US property management experience. This is non-negotiable. References should be former supervisors, clients, or colleagues who can speak to your property management work in the US. We will contact all references before extending an offer.



---



To Apply



Please include:

1. A summary of your US property management experience

2. What types of US properties you've managed (commercial, residential, short-term rental)

3. Your experience handling tenant escalations, legal notices, or evictions

4. Describe your leadership style — give a specific example of how you've delegated a task to a tea
mber, verified the work, and stepped in when guidance was needed

5. Any project management training, certifications, or experience (PMP, Agile, etc.)

6. What PM and accounting software you've used

7. 3 work references from US-based individuals (name, company, role, phone/email)

8. Your availability to start



About Aoede LLC



Aoede LLC is a Texas-based property management company overseeing a growing, diversified portfolio of commercial, single-family, and short-term rental properties across Texas and California. Founded with the mindset of a startup but built on enterprise-level professional experience, we move fast, build smart, and hold ourselves to a high standard.



Our team of 10+ professionals spans multiple countries and operates fully remote, managing everything from a 70-unit commercial building in Houston to Airbnb properties in Austin and single-family rentals in California. We hire talent from around the world — including the Philippines, Vietnam, India, Sri Lanka, Pakistan, Nigeria, Kenya, Ghana, South Africa, Venezuela, and beyond. We don't care where you sit. We care how you perform.



What makes us different: we combine the speed and scrappiness of a startup with the processes, structure, and professionalism you'd expect from a much larger organization. We invest heavily in documentation — our runbooks and tutorials are built so that the right person can get up to speed quickly and operate independently. We reward performance, not tenure. If you learn the material, execute at a high level, and take ownership of your work, you'll grow here.



Our culture is built on communication, collaboration, and humility. We operate as a team — not in silos. Everyone, from leadership down, is open to feedback and willing to hear what they need to do to improve. We're not perfect and we don't pretend to be. What we do is strive for continuous improvement and learning every single day. Leadership is genuinely invested in finding better ways to do things, and we expect the same mindset from everyone on the team.



A Note on Honesty



We value honesty over impressive claims. Please don't tell us you're an expert in something you've only read about or briefly touched. It's okay to say "I've used AppFolio a few times but I'm not an expert" or "I haven't handled evictions before but I'm willing to learn." We will find out the truth — whether it's during the assessment, the interview, or the first week on the job. And when we do, it damages trust that's very hard to rebuild.



We would much rather hire someone who says "I don't know that yet, but I'll learn it" than someone who claims to know everything and can't deliver. Being humble, honest about where you are, and willing to put in the work to grow — that's what gets you far here. We have the training, the runbooks, and the team support to get the right person up to speed. What we can't teach is integrity.



We're actively expanding our portfolio and our team. We do annual team bonding trips because we believe the people behind the work matter just as much as the work itself.



This is a company where your work matters, your voice is heard, and your growth is directly tied to what you put in.

title: Video Ads Editor
description:
Novantro is a Reddit Marketing Agency helping B2B companies and agencies generate revenue from Reddit. We're founder-led, lean by design, and currently at $50K/month. Our goal is simple: hit $100K/month, and we're moving fast to get there.



Why We're Hiring



This role is for us, not our clients. We need a dedicated video editor to own all of Novantro's
 and Instagram ad creative the ads that bring new B2B clients to us.



We're looking for a video editor who lives and breathes
 and Instagram ads. This is not a general video editing role your primary focus will be cutting high-performing ad creative for Meta platforms (Feed, Reels, Stories) that stops the scroll, holds attention, and drives conversions. If you understand the difference between an ad that gets ignored and one that prints money, we want to talk to you.



What You'll Do



Edit short-form video ads (30-120 seconds) optimized for
 and Instagram placements (9:16, 1:1, 4:5).

Craft strong hooks within the first 3 seconds to maximize rate.

Add captions, text overlays, motion graphics, and sound design that work with sound off (and on).

Produce multiple variations of the same ad for A/B and creative testing (different hooks, CTAs, pacing, thumbnails).

Edit UGC-style content, talking-head videos, product demos, and mixed-format creatives.

Iterate quickly based on performance data if an ad is winning, cut more like it; if it's losing, diagnose why.

Stay current with Meta ad trends, formats, and policy requirements.



Must-Have Experience



2+ years editing video ads specifically for
 and Instagram (please share examples).

Strong portfolio of Meta ads you've edited, ideally with performance metrics (CTR, ROAS, hook rate) where possible.

Proficiency in Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, or equivalent.

Deep understanding of vertical/square video, native captioning, and Meta's ad specs.

Sense for direct-response pacing fast cuts, pattern interrupts, clear CTAs.

Ability to edit and deliver ads quickly without sacrificing quality (often multiple variations per concept).



Nice to Have



Experience editing for YouTube (long-form, YouTube Shorts, or YouTube ads).

Experience working directly with media buyers or performance marketers.



What We're NOT Looking For



Cinematic/narrative editors with no paid social experience.

Editors who need a polished brief for every project you should be able to look at raw footage and a product and know what to do.



Application Priority



To be considered first, fill out this application form with your Reddit experience and examples:

title: Real Estate Lead Follow-Up & Qualification Specialist (Remote)
description:
***MUST SUBMIT DISC SCORES AND VOICE RECORDING IN ORDER TO BE CONSIDERED***

We are hiring an Inbound Real Estate Lead Follow-Up & Qualification Specialist to handle warm inbound homeowner leads from people actively searching online to sell their homes.



This role exists to filter, qualify, or disqualify leads before they ever reach our acquisition team.



This is not sales, not cold calling, and not persuasion.



If you are comfortable asking direct questions, enforcing clear criteria, and ending calls professionally when a lead is not a fit, this role may be right for you.



What You’ll Be Doing



Respond to warm inbound homeowner inquiries (no cold calling)



Conduct structured qualification calls using a clear scorecard



Ask direct questions about:



motivation



timeline



property condition



decision-maker status



price expectations



Apply qualification rules consistently



Disqualify early when criteria are not met (this is considered success)



Transfer only clean, well-qualified opportunities to acquisitions



Document outcomes clearly in the CRM



You are evaluated on decision quality and discipline, not call volume.



Work Schedule & Availability (Important)



This role requires full-day availability, not just total hours.



Typical schedule:



4–5 hours work



2-hour break



4–5 hours work



Leads come in throughout the day and require timely follow-up.



This role is not suitable if you need a fragmented or flexible schedule.



Who This Role Is For



You may be a strong fit if you:



Are comfortable asking direct questions



Can say “no” calmly and professionally



Prefer clear rules over improvisation



Stay emotionally steady on calls



Document accurately and follow SOPs



Work well independently in a remote environment



Who This Role Is NOT For



This role is likely not a fit if you:



Are looking for a sales or commission-heavy role



Prefer persuasion over qualification



Dislike enforcing rules



Want flexibility instead of structure



Feel uncomfortable disqualifying friendly sellers



Preferred DISC Tendencies (Not Required, but Helpful)



Moderate Dominance (comfortable leading conversations)



Low–moderate Influence (professional, not sales-driven)



Moderate Steadiness (calm, patient)



Moderate Compliance (respects rules and processes)



High-pressure sales personalities are not a fit.



What We Offer



100% remote role



Consistent warm inbound leads



Clear SOPs, scorecards, and expectations



Stable, long-term opportunity for the right fit



Professional, process-driven team environment



How to Apply



Please include a short answer to this question with your application:



“When would you disqualify a seller who sounds friendly but does not meet your criteria?”

title: Shortform Video Editor (TikTok / Reels)
description:
We are a fast-growing social media management agency looking for a talented Shortform Video Editor to join our remote team.



You will be editing around 3-4x unique videos a day splitted onto multiple accounts (21 accounts in total) which will result in 63-84+ short-form videos per day (TikTok & Instagram Reels) using CapCut. This is a high-volume, fast-paced role that requires precision, consistency, and attention to detail. 



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Edit 63-84+ videos daily (4x per day × 21 accounts; Instagram Reels may be added)

- Apply retention-optimized cuts with a hook every ~3 seconds

- Maintain natural skin tones, whiten teeth, and optimize audio levels

- Cut engaging hooks and captions that stop the scroll and drive retention

- Correctly apply provided sounds, effects, and overlays per brief

- Work with German-language content - you are responsible for translations and must proactively ask when unclear

- Implement feedback precisely and deliver on time every day



REQUIREMENTS:

- Proven experience in shortform video editing (TikTok/Reels) - MANDATORY

- Expert-level CapCut skills

- Strong understanding of retention-based cutting (pacing, hooks, keeping viewers engaged)

- Reliable internet, own device, and ability to meet daily deadlines

- Detail-oriented and able to handle high volume without quality drops

- Good communication - flag issues early, not after the deadline



NOTE: We evaluate quality, speed, and ability to follow instructions.



HOW TO APPLY:

To be considered, your application MUST include:



1. Start your message with exactly: "I'm a human"

2. Your portfolio or 3+ examples of shortform edits you have done

3. A short intro (2-3 sentences) about your editing experience

4. Your availability and expected monthly rate



Applications that do not start with "I'm a human" will not be considered.

title: Shopify Product Lister and Moderator
description:
We are an agency that helps eCommerce brands stay active on Google Merchant Center (GMC) so they can keep running Google Ads. We’re hiring a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant (VA) to review and approve Shopify product listings before submission to Google. Your main goal is to ensure a consistent number of listings are submitted daily for each store, with every listing reviewed in around 4.5 minutes or less, while maintaining GMC compliance. Focus on spotting high-risk issues such as misleading claims, image/logo problems, or prohibited content across your assigned stores.



This role is ideal for someone with strong English comprehension and the ability to quickly skim product descriptions while identifying potential compliance issues. It suits candidates who have experience creating Shopify product listings, especially those familiar with GMC requirements.



Responsibilities:

title: Remote Engineering Support – CAD/BIM, Low Voltage & Fire Alarm Systems
description:
About Us

Industrial Electronic Systems, Inc. (IES) is a U.S.-based fire alarm and life safety systems company serving commercial customers in Northern California. We specialize in fire alarm design, installation, inspections, and low voltage systems integration.



About the Role

We are hiring a Remote Engineering Support specialist to help our U.S. engineering team design and document low voltage and fire alarm systems for commercial buildings. This is a hands-on engineering role — you'll model in BIM, draft in CAD, research code, and produce real deliverables for active construction projects.



We need someone who is:

• A strong CAD and BIM modeler (this is non-negotiable)

• Experienced with low voltage system design

• Comfortable with NFPA 72 / NEC code research (fire alarm experience is a big plus)

• A self-starter who can solve design challenges independently

• Detail-obsessed — drawings, layers, sheet sets, and revisions all done right

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities



CAD & BIM Engineering

• Produce 2D AutoCAD drawings — device layouts, risers, wiring diagrams, system details, and submittal sets.

• Build and maintain 3D BIM models (Revit / Navisworks) for low voltage and fire alarm systems.

• Set up sheets, viewports, title blocks, layers, and XREFs to company CAD standards.

• Coordinate clash detection and drawing updates with the broader project model.



Low Voltage & Fire Alarm Design Support

• Assist in designing NFPA-compliant fire alarm systems (device layout, spacing, placement).

• Support design of access control, intrusion, structured cabling, and other low voltage systems.

• Identify code-driven requirements — smoke/heat detector spacing, notification coverage, strobe candela placement, circuit routing and survivability.

• Review architectural and electrical drawings for design impact and coordination.



Research & Problem Solving

• Look up AHJ requirements (city/state fire department standards).

• Compare NFPA 72 / NEC requirements against local code amendments.

• Document findings and communicate design impacts to U.S. engineers.

• Identify missing information in plans and propose solutions before they become RFIs.



Submittals & Closeout

• Create submittal drawings, cut sheets, and product data packages.

• Update as-built drawings from field markups.

• Maintain version control and clean project files throughout the job lifecycle.

________________________________________

Required Qualifications

• Strong AutoCAD 2D skills (layers, XREFs, sheet sets, scaling) — required.

• Strong BIM skills in Revit and/or Navisworks — required.

• Solid understanding of low voltage systems (fire alarm, access control, security, structured cabling).

• Fire alarm experience is a big plus — NFPA 72, NEC, AHJ familiarity preferred.

• Ability to read and interpret architectural, mechanical, and electrical plans.

• Strong analytical skills and willingness to research code/AHJ requirements.

• Excellent written and spoken English.

• Reliable workstation, stable internet, and willingness to overlap with U.S. Pacific Time.

title: Construction Estimator / Quantity Takeoff Specialist (Part-Time, Project-Based)
description:
Construction Estimator / Quantity Takeoff Specialist (Part-Time, Project-Based)



We are a growing commercial construction company based in Canada looking for a reliable and detail-oriented estimator to support our pre-construction team. This is a part-time, project-by-project role with flexible hours, ideal for someone experienced in construction takeoffs who can deliver accurate work quickly.

You will be responsible for reviewing drawings and extracting quantities (BOQs) for scopes such as drywall, painting, ceilings, rough carpentry, and general interior commercial work.

We are specifically looking for someone who is responsive, organized, and able to meet deadlines consistently. Communication speed is just as important as technical skill.

The ideal candidate has experience with commercial (not just residential) projects, can read architectural drawings and specifications, and is comfortable identifying scope gaps or inconsistencies. Experience with tools such as Bluebeam Revu, PlanSwift, or similar takeoff software is strongly preferred. Please confirm what tools you currently use and have access to.

Typical responsibilities include reviewing drawings, performing quantity takeoffs, providing clean and organized breakdowns for pricing, and flagging any missing scope or unclear information.

To apply, please include:





1-A short description of your experience with commercial construction projects

2-The tools you currently use for takeoffs

3-Your typical turnaround time for a small project

4-The word “BLUEPRINT” at the top of your application (this helps us filter for attention to detail)



We are building a long-term relationship with the right person and will have ongoing work available as our pipeline grows.

title: Book Keeper
description:
****YOU MUST SUBMIT A RESUME AND VOICE RECORDING IN ORDER TO BE CONSIDERED FOR A POSITION****





Position Overview:



We are looking for a dependable and detail-oriented Bookkeeper to join our team and take ownership of our day-to-day financial operations. This role is essential to maintaining the accuracy, organization, and integrity of our financial records. The ideal candidate is someone who enjoys working with numbers, has a strong sense of accountability, and can manage multiple financial tasks with precision and consistency.



As a Bookkeeper, you will play a key role in supporting the financial health of the organization by ensuring that all transactions are recorded properly and that accounts are kept up to date. You will work closely with management to provide clear visibility into financial performance and help ensure that all financial processes run smoothly.



Key Responsibilities:



In this role, you will be responsible for maintaining and updating financial records, including tracking daily transactions such as income, expenses, and payments. You will handle accounts payable and receivable, ensuring invoices are issued accurately and payments are collected and recorded in a timely manner. Regular reconciliation of bank and credit card statements will be part of your routine to ensure all records align correctly.



You will also assist with payroll processing, maintain organized financial documentation, and prepare periodic financial reports that provide insight into the company’s financial position. Attention to detail is critical, as you will be expected to identify discrepancies and resolve them efficiently. Additionally, you will help ensure compliance with applicable financial regulations and internal procedures.



Qualifications and Experience:



The successful candidate will have prior experience in bookkeeping or a similar accounting role, along with a solid understanding of basic accounting principles. Familiarity with accounting software such as QuickBooks, Xero, or similar platforms is important, as well as comfort working with spreadsheets and digital financial tools.



Strong organizational skills and the ability to prioritize tasks are essential in this role, as you will be handling multiple responsibilities at once. You should also demonstrate a high level of discretion and professionalism when working with sensitive financial information.



While not required, a degree in accounting, finance, or a related field, as well as any bookkeeping certifications, would be considered an asset.



Work Environment and Compensation:



This position offers the opportunity to work in a collaborative and supportive environment where accuracy and reliability are highly valued. Compensation will be based on experience and qualifications, and additional benefits may be available depending on employment type.



How to Apply:



If you are a motivated and detail-focused professional looking to contribute to a growing organization, we encourage you to apply. Please submit your resume along with a brief cover letter describing your relevant experience and interest in the rol

title: Web Developer / Support Engineer
description:
## About the Role



We're looking for a dedicated, full-time Web Developer and Support Engineer to join our team on a long-term basis. You'll build, maintain, and support our WordPress websites and platforms — from crafting custom theme functionality to managing the cloud infrastructure that keeps everything running. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys both writing code and solving problems, and who's comfortable switching between development work and hands-on customer support. You don't need to know everything on day one — we provide paid training and have senior technicians on hand to help you grow into the role.



## Position Details



- **Type:** Full-time, long-term position

- **Hours:** Australian business hours (AEST/AEDT)

- **Salary:** ~$1,500 USD/month

- **Location:** Remote — must be available to work during Australian business hours

- **Requirements:** Willingness to sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) and Non-Compete Agreement

- **Leave:** Australian public holidays off, plus leave over Easter and Christmas/New Year periods

- **Training:** Paid training provided to get you up to speed where there are knowledge gaps

- **Support:** You'll be backed by senior technicians who are available to guide, mentor, and support you



## Responsibilities



- Develop and maintain WordPress sites, including custom theme modifications, plugin configuration, and performance optimisation.

- Build and manage page layouts and content structures using Elementor and Advanced Custom Fields (ACF).

- Configure and support LearnDash-powered learning environments, including course setup, user management, and troubleshooting.

- Write custom PHP functions to extend WordPress themes and plugin behaviour as needed.

- Manage and monitor hosting infrastructure on Amazon EC2, including instance configuration and scaling.

- Configure and maintain Amazon Elastic Load Balancers to ensure high availability and reliable traffic distribution.

- Respond to support requests, diagnose issues, and implement fixes across the web stack.

- Communicate directly with clients via phone and
 — explaining technical issues clearly, providing updates, and guiding customers through solutions.

- Document technical processes, configurations, and solutions for the team's knowledge base.



## Required Skills & Experience



- **Exceptional written and spoken English** — you will be communicating directly with Australian clients via phone and
, so clear, professional, and confident English is essential.

- Solid working knowledge of **PHP** in the context of WordPress development.

- Experience building and customising sites with **WordPress**, including theme and plugin development.

- Proficiency with **Elementor** page builder for layout creation and management, using Hello Elementor as a theme base.

- Hands-on experience writing custom functions for **WordPress theme modifications** (functions.php, child themes, hooks, and filters).

- Familiarity with **Advanced Custom Fields (ACF)** for building flexible content structures.

- Experience with **Amazon EC2** instance management and **Elastic Load Balancing**.

- Comfortable performing **basic Linux troubleshooting** via the command line (SSH, log files, file permissions, service management).

- Willingness to receive and make phone calls to assist customers directly.

- Willingness to sign an NDA and Non-Compete Agreement.



## Nice to Have



- Experience with **Cloudflare** — particularly security configuration, DNS management, and Cloudflare Stream.

- Experience with **LearnDash** LMS configuration, course building, and user management.

- Familiarity with other AWS services (RDS, S3, CloudFront, Route 53).

- Understanding of web security best practices (SSL, firewalls, WordPress hardening).

- Familiarity with caching strategies (object caching, CDN configuration, page caching plugins).

- Experience with site migration and DNS management.



## What We Value



- A problem-solving mindset — you're resourceful and enjoy figuring things out.

- Clear, confident communication — you're comfortable picking up the phone and talking a client through an issue.

- A willingness to learn new tools and technologies as the role evolves.

- Ownership and reliability — you follow through and keep things running smoothly.

- Long-term commitment — we're looking to build a lasting working relationship, not fill a short-term gap.

title: AI Creative Producer (Videos) — Direct Response Ads (Health E-Commerce)
description:
:

???? About Us

We are Vertofix, a fast-growing German e-commerce brand in the back pain / sciatica relief niche. We sell a physical health product to customers aged 55-68 in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland. We are scaling aggressively with
 Ads and need someone who can produce high volumes of AI-generated ad creatives daily.

We are not looking for someone who "knows about AI." We are looking for someone who PRODUCES with AI every single day. High performers will get more hours, higher pay, and creative ownership over time.

???? Position Details

Position: AI Creative Producer

Type: Remote

Start: ASAP

Workload: 15-25 hours per week

Daily Work: Produce 3-10 AI ad creatives per day (images + videos)

???? Compensation

Starting Rate: $4/hour

Growth:

More hours as creative volume increases

Higher pay based on performance

Bonus for creatives that become winning ads

???? Your Role

Your job is to:

Generate AI images for Native Image ads using tools like Midjourney, Nano Banana Pro, or similar

Generate AI UGC videos using tools like Kling 3.0, Vo 3.1, HeyGen, or similar

Create AI voiceovers in German (male and female voices, aged 55-65)

Use Image-to-Video workflows (generate image first, then animate)

Produce multiple variations of the same concept quickly (different characters, different settings, different hooks)

Follow creative briefs we provide — you produce, we direct

???? Responsibilities

Receive creative briefs with script, angle, and visual direction from us

Generate AI images that look native and authentic (not overly polished, not obvious AI)

Produce AI UGC videos where a person speaks to camera with voiceover

Create b-roll clips using AI (doctor's office, person in pain, spine animations, product shots)

Deliver organized files with correct naming conventions daily

Test different AI tools and find the best output for each use case

Stay up to date on new AI tools — this space moves fast

? Requirements (IMPORTANT)

You MUST have:

At least 3 months hands-on experience producing AI-generated content (not just "playing with AI" — actually producing assets for ads or clients)

Working knowledge of at least TWO of these tools: Midjourney, Nano Banana, Kling, HeyGen, Sora, Runway, Vo 3.1, Seedance, ElevenLabs

Understanding of what makes a good direct response ad (scroll-stopping visuals, authentic look, not overly polished)

Ability to prompt effectively — you know how to get the output you want without 50 attempts

Reliable internet and ability to deliver daily

???? This job is NOT for you if:

You only use ChatGPT for text — we need IMAGE and VIDEO production

You have never produced AI content for actual ads or clients

You think AI art means making pretty pictures — we need converting ad assets

You cannot deliver consistent daily output

You need someone to write your prompts for you

???? FILTER QUESTIONS (VERY IMPORTANT)

You MUST answer ALL questions to be considered.

If you don't answer properly, your application will be ignored.



AI Production Experience

How long have you been producing AI-generated images and videos?

???? Be specific — months + what you produced + for whom

Tools

Which AI tools do you use daily for image AND video generation?

???? List every tool you are comfortable with

Image-to-Video Workflow

Explain your workflow for turning a text brief into a finished AI UGC video.

???? Step by step — what tools in what order

Prompting Skill

If I tell you "Generate an image of a 60-year-old German woman sitting on a sofa holding her lower back in pain, living room setting, natural lighting, photorealistic" — what tool would you use and how would you refine the prompt if the first output looks too artificial?

???? Explain your process

Direct Response Understanding

What makes an AI-generated ad image look "native" on
 instead of looking like obvious AI?

???? One or two sentences

Portfolio

Send 3-5 examples of AI-generated images OR videos you have produced.

???? If for clients/ads, even better. If personal projects, that's okay too.

Speed

How many finished AI ad creatives (images + videos combined) can you realistically produce in one 8-hour workday?

???? Be honest

New Tools

A new AI video tool launches tomorrow that is better than everything you currently use. What do you do?

???? Explain your approach

Attention Test (IMPORTANT)

Write the word: INFRARED at the BEGINNING of your application.

(If missing ? instant rejection)

Availability

How many hours per day can you work?

???? Specify hours and timezone

Long-Term Interest

Are you looking for a long-term position or just a quick project?

???? Yes / No + explain



???? How to Apply

Send:

The word INFRARED as first word

Short introduction

Answers to ALL 11 questions

3-5 portfolio examples of AI-generated content

Your hourly rate expectation

???? Final Note

AI creative production is the future of advertising. We are building a team that produces 50-100+ ad variations per week using AI. If you are fast, skilled, and want to be part of a brand that is scaling aggressively — this is your opportunity. But it starts with your application. Show us you actually read this.

title: YouTube Video Manager (Editor & Thumbnail)
description:
IMPORTANT NOTE: I'm getting a lot of applications, do NOT send an AI generated message, I prefer a really short but human message instead of something AI generated. If you send an AI application, I will guess you didn't even read this so I will probably ignore the application. If you read this let me know in the application message.



I will provide short raw videos (2-3 mins each), you will need to edit the video (just simple cuts, no skill required) and make a thumbnail following a template (you only need to change text and 1 or 2 images).

My goal is to have 24 videos everyday.

From my personal experience, each video takes less than 7 minutes to be completely ready, so you will work less than 3 hours per day.

title: Ad Uploader & Media Buying Assistant (Facebook Ads)

JOB TITLE: Ad Uploader & Media Buying Assistant 
 Ads)

We are Vertofix, a fast-growing German e-commerce brand in the back pain / sciatica relief niche. We run
 Ads at scale and need someone to handle the daily execution inside the Ads Manager so the founder can focus on strategy and creative direction.

This is NOT a strategy role. This is an execution role. You follow SOPs, upload ads, manage naming conventions, and keep the ad account organized. High performers will grow into a full Media Buyer role with decision-making responsibility.

???? Compensation

More hours as ad volume increases

Higher pay as you take on more responsibility

Path to full Media Buyer role if you prove yourself

???? Your Role

Your job is to:

Upload new ad creatives into
 Ads Manager following our exact structure and naming convention

Duplicate existing campaigns and ad sets when instructed

Keep the ad account clean and organized at all times

Follow SOPs precisely — no improvisation, no "I thought it would be better this way"

???? Responsibilities

Upload 5-15 new ads per day into correct campaigns and ad sets

Apply correct naming convention to every ad, ad set, and campaign (we have a specific system)

Set correct targeting, budget, and optimization settings as instructed

Duplicate winning ads into scaling campaigns when instructed

Turn off underperforming ads when instructed

? Requirements (IMPORTANT)

You MUST have:

At least 3 months experience working INSIDE
 Ads Manager (not boosting posts — actually building campaigns, ad sets, and ads)

Understanding of campaign structure (CBO vs ABO, ad set level targeting, ad level creative)

Experience with bulk uploading or managing 20+ active ads at once

Extreme attention to detail — one wrong setting can waste hundreds of dollars

Ability to follow SOPs without deviation

Fast and reliable — if we say "upload these 10 ads today" it needs to happen today, not tomorrow

???? This job is NOT for you if:

You have only boosted posts on

You don't know the difference between CBO and ABO

You are sloppy with naming conventions and organization

You think this role is about making strategy decisions — it's not, it's execution

You cannot be available daily

???? FILTER QUESTIONS (VERY IMPORTANT)

You MUST answer ALL questions to be considered.

If you don't answer properly, your application will be ignored.



 Ads Manager Experience

How long have you worked inside
 Ads Manager?

???? Be specific — months + what you did (uploading, reporting, building campaigns, etc.)

Campaign Structure

Explain the difference between CBO and ABO in 2-3 sentences.

???? If you can't answer this, don't apply.

Naming Conventions

We use this naming format for ads: ANGLE_SPOKESPERSON_HOOK_EMOTION_VERSION

If I give you an ad for Bandscheibenvorfall angle, Patient spokesperson, Secret Lead hook, Resignation emotion, Version 1 — what would you name it?

???? Write the exact name

Bulk Upload

What is the maximum number of ads you have uploaded in a single day?

???? Be specific

Attention to Detail

You are uploading 10 ads. Ad #7 has a different landing page URL than the others. What do you do?

???? Explain your process

Problem Handling

You try to upload an ad and
 rejects it immediately. What steps do you take?

???? Explain your process

Tools

Do you have experience with any of these:
 Business Manager, Ads Manager, Meta Business Suite, Excel/Google Sheets for reporting?

???? List which ones and what you did with them

Reporting

If I ask you to pull a weekly report showing Spend, CTR Link, CPC, ROAS, and Sales for each ad — can you do that?

???? Yes / No + explain how you would do it

Attention Test (IMPORTANT)

Write the word: SCALING at the BEGINNING of your application.

(If missing ? instant rejection)

Availability

How many hours per day can you work? What timezone are you in?

???? We need overlap with European business hours (CET)

Long-Term Interest

Are you looking for a long-term position or just a quick project?

???? Yes / No + explain



???? How to Apply

Send:

The word SCALING as first word

Short introduction

Answers to ALL 11 questions

Any screenshots or proof of past
 Ads Manager work (blur sensitive data if needed)

Your hourly rate expectation

???? Final Note

This role is the backbone of our ad operations. Without clean uploads and organized data, nothing works. If you are detail-oriented, fast, and reliable — you will become essential to our team. And essential tea
mbers get rewarded. But it starts with your application. Show us you actually read this.

title: Online Arbitrage VA
description:
About Us:

We are a new but fast-growing Amazon business specializing in online arbitrage. Although we're still in the early stages, we’re scaling quickly and building a team of highly skilled professionals who are serious about long-term success. Our goal is to create a results-driven, supportive, and collaborative environment where tea
mbers grow with us.



Job Description:

We are looking for a highly skilled and experienced Amazon Online Arbitrage Virtual Assistant (OA VA) to join our team! If you’re already familiar with sourcing profitable products for Amazon FBA/FBM using online arbitrage methods, this is the perfect opportunity for you.



You must be comfortable working independently, managing time effectively, and using proven sourcing tools and techniques to find winning products that meet our criteria.



Responsibilities:

- Daily sourcing of profitable products.

- Analyze products.

- Maintain and update sourcing spreadsheets

- Communicate progress daily and meet sourcing targets



Requirements:

- At least 2 years of hands-on experience in Amazon Online Arbitrage sourcing

- Strong knowledge of tools like Keepa, SAS, Google Sheets, and Amazon Seller Central

- Excellent attention to detail and analytical skills

- Ability to adapt based on direct feedback

- Strong communication skills in English

- A quiet work environment with a stable internet connection

- Self-motivated and reliable



When Applying:

Please answer the following questions in your application or send me a message with your responses:



- How long have you worked in Amazon Online Arbitrage?

- Which sourcing techniques have you used?

- Which tools do you currently use and feel confident with?

- What Keepa and SellerAmp criteria make a product profitable?

- How many profitable leads can you find per day on average?



Starting Pay:

$3/hr is the starting pay. We believe in rewarding performance and loyalty. If you are meeting sourced product criteria, noticeably improving with feedback, and maintaining a 3 lead per day pace in profitable leads, then you can expect a monthly raise.



If you’re looking for a stable, full-time opportunity with room to grow and contribute to a fast-moving environment, we’d love to hear from you and have you as part of our team!
