title: Social Media Manager- Music & Entertainment
description:
## Job Description: Music & Artist Brand Social Media Manager



**Role:** Social Media Manager, Music & Artist Brand

**Type:** Freelance, part-time, or contract-to-hire

**Location:** Remote

**Reports to:** Artist / Management / Creative Director



### Overview



We are seeking a music and artist brand Social Media Manager to oversee, grow, and engage an established artist’s online community across social platforms, streaming channels, ecommerce, and fan touchpoints.



The core of this role is **writing**. The right candidate must be able to write in the voice and tone of the artist with nuance, restraint, emotional intelligence, and consistency. This person should understand how to translate an artist’s world into captions, replies, product copy, fan messages, campaign posts, release language, and platform-specific storytelling without making it feel generic, over-marketed, or detached from the artist’s identity.



This role requires someone who understands music culture, fan communities, artist mythology, and the care required to represent a highly personal creative voice online.



### Key Responsibilities



#### Voice, Tone & Copywriting



Write social captions, community replies, campaign copy, merch descriptions, ecommerce blurbs, streaming posts,
 snippets, and short-form scripts in the artist’s established voice.



Develop and maintain a clear voice and tone guide for the artist across social, streaming, ecommerce, and fan communications.



Capture the artist’s emotional register, humor, mystery, intelligence, vulnerability, and cadence without over-explaining or diluting the brand.



Adapt writing for each platform while keeping the artist’s voice consistent.



Avoid generic music marketing language, forced trends, corporate phrasing, or copy that feels disconnected from the artist.



Help turn lyrics, archival materials, visual assets, fan comments, cultural references, and behind-the-scenes 
nts into compelling written content.



#### Social Media Strategy & Management



Develop and manage the artist’s social media presence across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube,
, X, Threads, 
, Reddit, and other relevant platforms.



Create and maintain a content calendar for releases, merch drops, streaming campaigns, fan engagement, archival storytelling, live 
nts, and cultural opportunities.



Translate the artist’s creative world into social content that feels personal, intelligent, emotional, and fan-aware.



Identify trends and platform behaviors that can be used thoughtfully without compromising the artist’s voice.



#### Community & Fan Engagement



Monitor and engage with fans across comments, DMs, tags, shares, posts, and fan communities.



Respond in a tone that feels human, intimate, smart, and aligned with the artist’s voice.



Track fan sentiment, recurring questions, collectible interest, merch demand, and release feedback.



Identify superfans, creators, collectors, remixers, gamers, and community voices who can help amplify the brand.



#### Streaming & Music Platform Support



Support growth and engagement across Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music, Amazon Music, Bandcamp, SoundCloud, and related music platforms.



Coordinate social campaigns around streaming links, playlists, pre-saves, video premieres, lyric content, live recordings, vinyl releases, and catalog discovery.



Help optimize artist profiles, platform descriptions, visual assets, links, and messaging where applicable.



Track streaming 
nts, playlist adds, fan-generated spikes, and relevant data signals.



#### Ecommerce & Merchandise Promotion



Support social promotion for the artist’s ecommerce store, vinyl releases, limited editions, apparel, collectibles, and special drops.



Write product and campaign copy that gives merchandise context, story, scarcity, and emotional value.



Connect product pages, social posts,
 campaigns, and fan engagement into a cohesive sales funnel.



Monitor customer questions related to products, shipping, availability, sizing, editions, and collectible value, escalating as needed.



#### Content Development



Source and organize visual assets, video clips, lyrics, archival materials, press quotes, fan content, and release assets.



Collaborate with editors, designers, ecommerce managers, and the artist team to produce platform-specific content.



Help shape posts around the artist’s music, story, creative process, collaborations, vinyl culture, gaming connections, and fan mythology.



#### Analytics & Reporting



Track growth, engagement, reach, clicks, saves, shares, follower quality, ecommerce referrals, streaming conversions, and fan sentiment.



Provide weekly or bi-weekly reports with clear insights and recommendations.



Identify which posts, platforms, content types, copy approaches, and fan conversations are driving the most value.



Recommend testing strategies for posting frequency, creative formats, paid boosts, ecommerce CTAs, and streaming campaigns.



### Ideal Experience



3+ years managing social media, copywriting, or community engagement for an artist, music brand, label, entertainment property, ecommerce brand, or fan-driven cultural brand.



Exceptional writing ability is required.



Strong understanding of artist voice, tone, cadence, subtext, and storytelling.



Ability to write emotionally resonant copy that can be poetic, restrained, mysterious, funny, direct, intimate, or promotional as needed.



Experience writing captions, fan replies, product copy, launch copy,
 snippets, short-form video scripts, and campaign language.



Strong understanding of music marketing, artist storytelling, fandoms, streaming behavior, and merch culture.



Experience with Instagram, TikTok, YouTube,
, X, Threads, 
, Reddit, Shopify, Spotify for Artists, Apple Music for Artists, YouTube Studio, Bandcamp, and
/social campaign tools.



Comfortable engaging with passionate fans and protecting the artist’s voice.



Interest in alternative music, legacy artists, gaming culture, ARG-style storytelling, vinyl, fan collectibles, and immersive artist worlds is a major plus.



### Core Skills



Artist voice copywriting

Social media writing

Community management

Music marketing

Fan engagement

Tone of voice development

Caption writing

Ecommerce copywriting

Streaming campaign support

Short-form video copy

Content calendars

Analytics and reporting

Shopify and merch campaign support

Platform trend awareness

Brand storytelling



### Success Metrics



Consistent, high-quality writing in the artist’s voice

Growth in engaged followers across priority platforms

Increased fan interaction, comments, shares, saves, and DMs

Higher traffic from social to streaming and ecommerce

Improved merch drop performance and product awareness

Stronger fan sentiment and community participation

Consistent content cadence across channels

Clear reporting and actionable insights

Authentic preservation of the artist’s voice, tone, mythology, and creative identity



### Personality Fit



The right person is first and foremost a writer: someone who can listen closely, absorb a voice, and write from inside the artist’s world without imitating it badly or reducing it to marketing language.



They should be strategic but not corporate, organized but not rigid, culturally fluent but not trend-chasing, and emotionally intelligent enough to represent an artist with a deep, loyal, and highly invested fan base.



This is not just a music act. It is a world, a history, a voice, a mystery, a community, and a living creative system. This role is about helping that world speak clearly, consistently, and powerfully online.

description:
:

???? About Us

We are Vertofix, a fast-growing German e-commerce brand in the back pain / sciatica relief niche. We sell via Shopify to customers aged 55-68 in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland. We are scaling aggressively and need someone who keeps our Shopify store optimized, implements funnel changes, and makes sure nothing breaks while we grow.

This is a technical execution role with strategic impact. Every change you make on the store directly affects our conversion rate and revenue.

???? Position Details

Position: Shopify Manager & Web Developer

Type: Remote

Start: ASAP

Workload: 10-20 hours per week

Daily Work: Implement store changes, build landing pages, set up upsells, fix bugs, optimize for conversions

???? Compensation

Starting Rate: $4/hour (depending on skill level)

Growth:

More hours as we add products and funnels

Higher pay based on performance and complexity of work

Long-term position with increasing responsibility

???? Your Role

Your job is to:

Manage and maintain our Shopify store daily

Build and edit landing pages and advertorial pages

Implement and optimize post-purchase upsells (OTOs)

Set up order bumps and in-cart upsells

A/B test product pages, pricing, and page layouts

Install and configure Shopify apps

Fix bugs and broken elements quickly

Implement tracking pixels and conversion scripts when needed

At least 6 months experience managing a live Shopify store that was actively selling and running paid traffic

Experience setting up post-purchase upsells / OTOs

You take 3 days to make a small page edit

You don't test your work on mobile before delivering

???? FILTER QUESTIONS (VERY IMPORTANT)

You MUST answer ALL questions to be considered.

If you don't answer properly, your application will be ignored.



Shopify Experience

How long have you been working with Shopify?

???? Be specific — months + what stores you managed + approximate monthly revenue of those stores

Liquid Code

Rate your Shopify Liquid coding skills from 1-10 and give one example of something you built or fixed using Liquid.

???? Be specific

Post-Purchase Upsells

Have you set up post-purchase upsell flows (OTOs) before?

???? Which app did you use? What was the upsell take rate?

Landing Pages

Have you built custom landing pages on Shopify for paid traffic?

???? Describe one you built and what conversion rate it achieved

CRO Understanding

We have a product page with 30 Add-to-Carts per day but only 3 purchases. What would you investigate and test?

???? Explain your diagnosis process

Mobile Optimization

What specific things do you check and fix when optimizing a Shopify page for mobile?

???? List at least 4 things

Speed

If I send you a wireframe for a new landing page at 10am, how fast can you have it live on the store?

???? Be honest

Apps

Which Shopify apps have you installed and configured before?

???? List all of them

Portfolio

Send 2-3 links to live Shopify stores you have worked on, or screenshots of pages you built.

???? Blur sensitive data if needed

Attention Test (IMPORTANT)

Write the word: CONVERSION at the BEGINNING of your application.

(If missing ? instant rejection)

Availability

How many hours per week can you work?

???? Specify hours and timezone

Long-Term Interest

Are you looking for a long-term position?

???? Yes / No + explain



???? How to Apply

Send:

The word CONVERSION as first word

Short introduction

Answers to ALL 12 questions

2-3 portfolio examples

Your hourly rate expectation

???? Final Note

Our store is the foundation of our entire business. Every percentage point of conversion rate improvement means thousands of euros in additional revenue. If you understand Shopify deeply and know how to make stores convert, this is a high-impact role with real growth. But it starts with your application. Show us you actually read this.

title: Instagram DM Outreach Specialist — UK Fitness Niche (Part-Time, Long-Term)
description:
Hi! I run a video editing agency for UK fitness coaches and I'm hiring a reliable Virtual Assistant to handle cold DM outreach on Instagram across two of my brand accounts.

English requirement (read first):

You MUST be able to write fluent, natural-sounding English. This role involves writing a personalized opening line for each prospect, and the message has to read like a real native English speaker wrote it. Generic copy-paste DMs will not work. If your written English is not excellent, please do not apply.

What you'll do:

Each morning I'll send you 1–3 source Instagram accounts (other UK fitness coaches with big followings). Your job is to:



Open those accounts and scroll through their followers (and/or who they follow)

Find UK-based fitness coaches who match the criteria below

DM each prospect using my template, with a personalized opening line referencing their content



How to pick good prospects from the source accounts:



UK-based (check bio/location/content references)

1,000–50,000 followers

Posts regularly (active in the last 2 weeks)

Personal brand/coach (not a gym, brand, or company page)

Fitness/coaching niche (not nutritionist, physio, yoga unless they coach)



Daily flow:



3 sessions per day, ~45 mins each, working UK time, Monday–Friday only

Sessions: 8am UK / 1pm UK / 8pm UK (= 3pm / 8pm / 3am Manila)

Volume: starts at ~15 DMs/day in week 1, ramps to 100–120 DMs/day across both accounts by week 4

Log every DM in a Google Sheet (provided) so we don't double-message anyone

WhatsApp summary at end of each day (numbers sent, any issues)

Pause and notify me immediately if any IG warning or restriction appears



Important — what you will NOT do:



You will NOT open or read any incoming DMs/replies. I handle ALL replies myself.

If you a
 open a reply, mark it as unread immediately.

You will not book sales calls or message anyone outside the daily brief.



Personalization example:

Look at the prospect's last 2–3 posts and reference one specifically.

GOOD:



"Hey [name], loved your recent reel on macro tracking — solid breakdown. Quick question — are you editing your videos yourself?"



BAD:



"Hey, love your content!"



If you can't write the GOOD example in fluent English, this role isn't for you.

What I'm looking for:



Excellent written English (essential)

Stable internet

Phone or laptop (phone preferred — safer for IG accounts)

Reliable schedule — Mon–Fri, UK hours including the late evening session

Previous IG outreach or social media VA experience preferred

Follows a written brief without going off-script



Pay:

$320/month flat, paid weekly via Wise every Friday ($80/week)

Hours:

~12 hours per week (3 sessions/day × ~45 mins × 5 days)

Trial:

2-week paid trial. If it's a good fit, ongoing long-term role.

To apply, send a 2-minute Loom video (
 — free) answering:



Have you done Instagram outreach for a client before? Tell me about it.

Imagine you're DMing a UK fitness coach with 5k followers whose last reel was about post-workout nutrition. Write me an actual personalized opening line you'd send them.

Confirm you can work UK hours (8am / 1pm / 8pm UK), Mon–Fri.



Applications without a Loom will not be considered.

Looking to hire this week.

title: Remote Project Manager Support – Low Voltage & Fire Alarm Construction
description:
About Us

Industrial Electronic Systems, Inc. (IES) is a U.S.-based fire alarm and life safety systems company serving commercial customers in Northern California. We specialize in fire alarm design, installation, inspections, and low voltage systems integration.



About the Role

We are hiring a Remote Project Manager Support specialist to work directly with our U.S. project managers on commercial low voltage and fire alarm construction projects. This is not an admin-only role. You will help drive projects from kickoff through closeout — tracking submittals, coordinating drawings, supporting RFIs, and keeping documentation tight across multiple active jobs.



We need someone who is:

• A strong communicator with U.S. PMs, engineers, and subcontractors

• Highly organized with contracts, drawings, submittals, and as-builts

• Comfortable in CAD and BIM environments (you'll review and mark up drawings, not just file them)

• Familiar with low voltage systems — fire alarm experience is a big plus

• A self-starter who can solve problems independently

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities



Project Coordination

• Functional knowledge of contracts, drawings, estimates, and specifications to ensure compliance with project requirements.

• Obtain, maintain, and administer the data, information, communications, and approvals required between owners, architects, engineers, and subcontractors.

• Support coordination and monitoring of contractors, subcontractors, engineers, and architects.

• Participate in project meetings — document action items, track statuses, and follow up on deliverables.



Documentation & Controls

• Manage submittals, RFIs, change orders, and as-built drawings.

• Provide project controls, cost tracking, and performance reporting support.

• Maintain organized project files and consistent document standards across all active jobs.

• Help ensure project closeout — guarantees, warranties, and final deliverables to the owner.



CAD/BIM Drawing Support

• Review architectural, electrical, and mechanical drawings for impact on low voltage and fire alarm scope.

• Mark up drawings, coordinate redlines with the design team, and route updates through CAD/BIM.

• Track drawing revisions and submittal versions across the project lifecycle.



Communication

• Coordinate daily with U.S. project managers, engineers, and field staff.

• Communicate clearly in writing and verbally — ask the right questions, escalate the right issues.

• Work independently across U.S. business hours overlap.

________________________________________

Required Qualifications

• Minimum 3 years of project management or PM support experience in construction.

• Strong working knowledge of CAD (AutoCAD 2D) and BIM (Revit or Navisworks).

• Solid understanding of low voltage systems (fire alarm, access control, security, structured cabling).

• Fire alarm experience is a big plus — NFPA 72, NEC, AHJ familiarity preferred.

• Ability to read and interpret architectural, electrical, and mechanical blueprints.

• Familiar with Bluebeam, MS Project or similar PM tools, and submittal/RFI workflows.

• Excellent written and spoken English.

• Reliable workstation, stable internet, and willingness to overlap with U.S. Pacific Time.

We are building a high-performance outbound sales team that books qualified meetings with decision-makers across the U.S.



The Role:

This is NOT a call center/Customer Support role.



We are hiring experienced B2B SaaS SDRs who have consistently booked meetings in the U.S. market and understand outbound sales at a strategic level.



You will be responsible for outbound prospecting — from cold calling to booking qualified meetings.

)

- Strong outbound cold calling background (not just warm leads)

- Quota-driven mindset

title: Full Stack Java Developer - Night Shift
description:
Our client is a premier, US-based fleet services powerhouse dedicated to keeping the wheels of American commerce turning. In an industry where every minute of downtime translates directly to lost revenue, they serve as a critical partner for businesses that rely on mobile assets. By blending technical expertise with a customer-first philosophy, they have established themselves as a leader in comprehensive fleet health management.

About the Role



We are seeking a Mid-to-Senior Full-Stack Java Developer to take full ownership of a suite of critical internal applications. This is a foundational role intended to offload development from company leadership to a dedicated, full-time engineering resource. You will be the architect and primary builder of proprietary tools that streamline national fleet operations, meaning your code will have a direct, daily impact on the efficiency of a major American industry leader.

Responsibilities





Application Development: Lead the development and maintenance of internal business applications using the Vaadin framework, ensuring a seamless integration of backend and frontend logic.

System Architecture: Design and manage robust backend services and relational database structures using Java and Postgres.

Cloud Infrastructure: Deploy, monitor, and scale applications within a cloud environment, ensuring high availability and performance.

Lifecycle Management: Maintain complete codebase integrity through GitHub, implementing modern CI/CD best practices to ensure rapid but stable deployment cycles.

Product Ownership: Collaborate directly with leadership to translate business needs into technical requirements, acting as both a developer and a strategic technical advisor.

Internal Tooling: Focus on building "internal app suites" that simplify complex business logic, reducing the need for manual intervention in fleet management.







Competencies and Qualifications





Must-Haves





Extensive professional software development experience (typically 5+ years) with a history of building enterprise-grade applications.

Deep, expert-level knowledge of Java and associated backend ecosystems.

Proficiency in relational database design and management using Postgres.

Proven familiarity with cloud infrastructure (Google/Azure), GitHub version control, and automated testing environments.

Ability to manage the full software development lifecycle independently and align with Mountain Time business hours for collaboration.



Nice-to-Haves





Prior experience with Vaadin Flow or Hilla.

Previous experience building internal business tools, ERP systems, or logistics/fleet management software.

Advanced familiarity with Postgres optimization and cloud scaling strategies.



What We Offer



100% Remote Work

13th Month Pay

Healthcare (HMO)

Comprehensive Fringe Benefits package

Paid Service Incentive Lead (SIL)

Paid Philippines Holidays

Free Learning and Development Programs



Application Process

We understand that searching for a new job can be challenging, and we’re here to support you every step of the way. Our goal is to make the process as transparent and respectful as possible.

Typically, the interview process includes a Recruiter Interview, Client Interview, and Practical Test, but this may vary depending on the role. Throughout each stage, we’ll keep you informed and provide feedback as quickly as we can, ensuring you feel valued and supported throughout your journey with us.

title: Customer Engagement Specialist — Remote
description:
BampsMediaMarketing is hiring Customer Engagement Specialists to join our remote team. We're a talent management agency, and this role sits at the heart of how we keep our clients' communities engaged, supported, and coming back.

The role

You'll be the voice behind the inbox. Day-to-day, you'll be replying to incoming messages from a client's customer base — building rapport, answering questions, recommending the right products or content for each person, and turning casual conversations into long-term loyalty. Think of it as part customer support, part relationship-building, part light sales.

This is a high-volume messaging role, so you'll need to type fast, switch tone naturally between different client accounts, and keep dozens of conversations moving without ever sounding copy-pasted.

Earnings

This role is built for people who want their effort to translate directly into income. Pay structure:



$3/hour base — guaranteed, regardless of performance

3% commission on every conversion — uncapped, paid out regularly

Performance bonuses on top for hitting weekly and monthly targets



Realistic monthly earnings for someone working consistent shifts and converting at team average sit well above the base alone. Top performers on the team earn multiples of that. The harder you work the inbox, the more you take home — there's no ceiling.

What you'll do



Respond to inbound messages quickly and in the personal voice of the client you're representing

Build genuine rapport with returning customers and remember the details that matter to them

Recommend relevant products, bundles, or premium options based on what each customer is looking for

Keep notes on customer preferences so the next conversation picks up where the last one left off

Hit daily engagement and conversion targets

Flag anything unusual to your team lead



What we're looking for



Excellent written English, with a natural, human, non-robotic tone

Fast, accurate typing (60+ wpm preferred)

Confidence with light sales conversations — you can read a customer and know when to suggest, when to listen, and when to back off

Reliable internet and a quiet space to work

Available to work shifts, including some evenings and weekends (the inbox doesn't sleep)

Discretion and professionalism — you'll be representing someone else's brand voice

Previous experience in customer service, sales, community management, or messaging-based roles is a plus but not essential



What else we offer



Fully remote — work from anywhere

Ongoing coaching and support from your team lead

Clear progression path into senior specialist, team lead, and account manager roles

A supportive team that actually responds when you message them



To apply

Send a short message telling us why you'd be good at this, along with your availability and any relevant experience. Applications without a personal note won't be reviewed.

title: Business Development Manager
description:

title: Real Estate Media Virtual Assistant (Photo/Video Editing + Operations Support)
description:
We’re a growing real estate media company based in Asheville, North Carolina, looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help manage and process daily media.



This role is a mix of photo and video editing, file organization, social media and operational support. You’ll play a key role in making sure our media is processed efficiently and delivered at a high standard to our clients.



?



Core Responsibilities



1. Daily Media Organization



* Organize incoming media files in Dropbox

* Separate interior and exterior images

* Maintain a clean and consistent file structure



2. Photo Editing Workflow



* Upload interior images to Fotello for processing

* Apply preset styles and perform quality control (QC)

* Edit exterior images using Adobe Camera Raw + Photoshop

* Perform advanced edits on interiors, including:

    * Item removal

    * Vertical corrections

    * Lighting adjustments

    * Adding fireplace flames

    * General image cleanup and polish



3. Special Media Creation



* Handle tasks such as:

    * Virtual staging using Collov.ai

    * Select best exterior for Day-to-dusk (DTD) edits

    * Photo-to-video tools



4. Content Creation



* Produce daily social media content using media captured during the week. Working knowledge of Canva and Adobe Premiere. 



5. Floor Plans



* Process and edit floor plans using CubiCasa

* (Adobe Illustrator experience is a strong plus)



6. Client Communication & Request Handling



* Monitor and respond to incoming client requests via company
 and phone (or messaging apps) during working hours

* Handle common requests such as:

    * Photo and video revision requests

    * Scheduling questions

    * Order updates and delivery inquiries

* Communicate clearly, professionally, and promptly with agents

* Gather necessary details and ensure requests are accurately executed

* Triage incoming messages:

    * Handle straightforward requests independently

    * Escalate more complex or sensitive issues when needed

* Maintain a high level of responsiveness and organization across all client communication

* Ensure no requests are missed and all follow-ups are completed



7. Project Coordination



* Stay aware of the team’s daily shoot schedule

* Understand what deliverables are required for each project



8. Delivery & Platforms



* Upload and deliver completed jobs through Aryeo

* Manage and edit:

    * Matterport tours

    * Zillow 3D tours



?



Required Skills & Experience



* Strong experience with:

    * Adobe Photoshop

    * Adobe Camera Raw

* High attention to detail (this is critical)

* Ability to follow structured workflows consistently

* Strong organizational skills (Dropbox/file management)

* Reliable internet and ability to work weekends (both days as needed)

* Strong written and spoken English communication skills

* Comfortable handling client communication via
 and phone



?



Bonus Skills (Not Required, but Valuable)



* WordPress + Elementor

* Google Business Profile optimization

* SEO knowledge

* Adobe Illustrator

* Experience with real estate media editing workflows



?



What We’re Looking For



* Someone dependable and responsive

* A problem-solver who can work independently

* Detail-oriented to the point where small mistakes bother you

* Comfortable working with repeatable systems and improving them over time



What Sets You Apart



* You communicate clearly and professionally with clients

* You are responsive and reliable—messages don’t sit unanswered

* You take ownership of requests and follow through to completion

* You stay organized even when handling multiple conversations and tasks



?



Final Application Step (Required Video Submission)



To be considered for this role, please submit a short video recording (2–4 minutes) answering the questions below.



This helps us understand how you communicate and think through real scenarios.



Please include:



1. Introduction

Tell us about your background and your experience with real estate media or photo/video editing workflows.



2. Client Communication Scenario

A real estate agent messages:

“The photos look great, but the living room feels dark and one image looks slightly tilted.”

How would you respond, and what actions would you take?



3. Prioritization Scenario

You have:



* A full batch of photos to process

* 2 urgent revision requests

* New messages coming into



How do you prioritize your work?



4. Weekend Availability Confirmation

Confirm your availability to work both Saturdays and Sundays consistently



?



Submission Instructions



* Record using Loom, Google Drive, or similar

* Ensure clear audio and good lighting

* Share the link along with your application



Applications without a video will not be considered.

title: Senior Bookkeeper (Australian Accounting)
description:
We are Roger, a specialist hospitality and restaurant accounting firm. We support restaurants, cafes, bars and hospitality operators with bookkeeping, payroll, supplier administration, accounts payable, reconciliations and reporting. We also provide clients with weekly P&L dashboards, budget vs actual reporting, expense breakdowns, KPI trends and GST visibility.



We are looking for a Senior Bookkeeper with at least 5 years of Australian bookkeeping or accounting experience. You must be very strong in Xero and comfortable using (or learning) Hubdoc daily.



This is not a junior role. We need someone accurate, reliable, responsive and confident working across multiple clients in a high-volume environment.



Key responsibilities



Reconcile bank feeds, credit cards, merchant facilities and payment platforms in Xero

Process supplier invoices daily through Hubdoc

Match bills, payments and receipts accurately

Investigate unreconciled items, duplicate entries and missing documents

Maintain accurate accounts payable records and supplier balances

Prepare clean, up-to-date Xero files for weekly reporting, BAS and month-end review

Prepare weekly accounts payable batch files

Complete weekly supplier statement reconciliations

Process payroll and complete payroll checks

Support weekly reporting and month-end close

Creating workflows which will be followed by future bookkeepers



Must-have requirements



Minimum 5 years of Australian bookkeeping or accounting experience

Strong Xero experience

BAS-ready bookkeeping experience

High attention to detail

Strong written English

Able to clean up messy files and identify errors quickly



Role details



Part-time role, currently 20 hours per week

Working hours: 10:00am to 2:00pm Philippines time

As we win additional clients, hours will increase by 5 hours per week per client

We expect this role to become full-time by July 2026

This role is intended to grow into a Bookkeeping Team Leader position managing junior bookkeepers



Who would suit this role

You have worked in Australian bookkeeping for several years, know Xero very well, understand reconciliations and accounts payable deeply, and can take ownership of your work without being micromanaged.



To apply, please answer the following



How many years of Australian bookkeeping experience do you have?

How many years have you used Xero?

Have you prepared BAS-ready files before?

Have you worked with hospitality, restaurant or cafe clients?

List your previous employers with contactable
s or Australian phone numbers to verify you experience

 marketing (e.g., Mailchimp or ConvertKit).

Iconent Group — US-Based Artist Management & Distribution

High-performance sales qualification role. Strict script, daily KPIs, no improvising. Serious applicants only.

01:00 AM – 09:00 AM Manila Time | Mon–Fri (Sat optional)

-Understands retention editing (pattern interrupts, pacing, visual hooks)

-Has a good eye for storytelling and emotional beats

-Able to work independently and meet deadlines consistently

-Familiar with copyright-safe content sourcing



This will start as a short-term opportunity (trial basis), with the potential to turn into a long-term role if the quality of work is a strong fit.



Please provide a link to your portfolio upon application.

title: Crypto Casino Customer Support

title: JOB POSTING — SHOPIFY STORE MANAGER Hearth Goodwill Group Full-Time | Remote | $1,000/month
description:
WHO WE ARE

We are a fast-moving ecommerce group operating multiple DTC brands across different niches. Our brands are mission-driven, product-focused, and built to scale. We move fast, we test constantly, and we expect the people we work with to keep up. We are looking for someone who can own the Shopify side of multiple stores completely — without needing to be managed at every step.



THE ROLE

A full-time Shopify Store Manager who takes complete ownership of store building, product listing, copywriting, and technical maintenance across multiple ecommerce brands. You will work directly with the founders and be the person who makes the stores look sharp, load fast, and convert consistently.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Find, source, and list new products with complete descriptions, pricing, and optimized images

Build and maintain storefront design across multiple brands — homepages, collection pages, product pages, and landing pages

Write conversion-focused copy for all product pages, collection pages, banners, and
 opt-ins

Build reusable product page templates and collection page templates that can be adapted across brands

Write, edit, and maintain Liquid code for custom sections, functionality, and design elements

Implement and manage Shopify apps, integrations, and third-party tools

Use AI tools daily to speed up copy production, image editing, product research, and store optimization

Keep every store technically clean — fast loading, fully mobile optimized, zero broken elements

Work directly with leadership on product launches, seasonal campaigns, and brand updates

Identify opportunities to improve conversion rate, page speed, and user experience without being asked





REQUIREMENTS — NON-NEGOTIABLE:



Minimum 2 years experience building and managing Shopify stores — not just editing existing stores, building from scratch

Able to write and edit Liquid code — this is a hard requirement, not a nice to have

Expert level with AI tools — ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, or equivalent — you use AI daily and your output is faster and better because of it

Strong conversion copywriting skills — you can write a product description or collection page that sells without being briefed on every word

Experience building custom section templates inside Shopify

Available full-time — this is a dedicated full-time role, not a freelance side project

Clean professional written English — all copy and communication must be sharp

Detail-oriented and self-directed — broken links, slow pages, and sloppy copy are not things you let through



NICE TO HAVE:



Experience managing multiple Shopify stores simultaneously

Experience with DTC brands at meaningful ad spend levels

Knowledge of how product pages and store design connect to paid Meta or TikTok traffic

Experience with Funnelish, ClickFunnels, or other funnel builders

Familiarity with Shopify apps — reviews, upsells, subscriptions, bundles, loyalty programs

Basic graphic design skills — Canva, Figma, or equivalent





WHAT WE OFFER:



$1,000 per month — paid monthly

Full-time remote — work from anywhere in the world

Direct access to founders — no corporate layers, no slow approvals, no bureaucracy

Multiple active brands to work across — variety, pace, and real ownership of your work

Room to grow in responsibility and compensation as the brands scale





HOW TO APPLY:

Send the following to [INSERT
]:



Links to at least two Shopify stores you have built or managed — not stores you helped with, stores you owned

One example of custom Liquid code you have written — paste it directly or link to it

Your answer to this question in three sentences or less — "You are listing a new product for a DTC brand. The product is a handcrafted beaded bracelet. Write a one-sentence product description that makes someone want to buy it."

List the AI tools you use daily and give one specific example of how you use them to produce better work faster



Applications without all four items will not be reviewed. No exceptions.



We run lean. We move fast. We build brands that people actually care about. If you want a slow corporate environment this is not the right fit. If you want real ownership of real work across real brands — send your application.

title: 2D Animation SIMPLE Stick cartoon
description:
Looking for AI 2D Cartoon Video Editor youtube Channel (4 Videos/Week)



Hey!



I'm looking for a skilled 2e editor to create AI 2D cartoon-style YouTube videos for my channel. The channel covers explainer video.





reverence video :











Each video should be a minimum of 15 minutes long and we need 4 videos delivered per week. Pay is $15 per video.



I will provide the script and voiceover. You will not need to do any research  your job is to create engaging AI 2D cartoon visuals, find background music, and bring the script to life visually in a style that fits the military niche.



I am Looking for Someone Who:



Has proven experience creating AI 2D cartoon YouTube videos.



Can deliver a minimum of 15 minutes of finished content per video.



Has experience with video editing software (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut Pro, or similar)

Is fluent in English.



Can meet deadlines consistently — 4 videos per week, every week.



Understands how to pace long-form YouTube content to keep viewers engaged.



Style & Creative Direction

The visual style should feel cinematic and serious — this is not a kids' cartoon channel. Think gritty,  2D animation that matches the weight of the stories we tell. You have creative freedom to make it engaging, but it must stay within our brand style (full guidelines provided).



 If you have read the middle of this job posting, please type your favorite military unit at the beginning or end of your proposal.



To Apply, Please Answer the Following Questions:



Share the best AI 2D cartoon video you have made, YouTube or Google Drive links only

Have you ever made a long-form cartoon video (20+ minutes) for a YouTube channel? If yes, share the link

Can you consistently deliver 4 videos per week? What does your current workload look like?



Only share Google Drive or YouTube links, no other file types will be reviewed.



I look forward to working with you!

title: Join Our Team! Full-Time GDS Specialist (Sabre) – Communications & Ticketing
description:
Are you a Sabre expert looking for a positive, growth-oriented place to call your professional home?

We are looking for a detail-oriented and confident GDS Specialist to join our team full-time. We truly value a positive attitude, proactive problem-solving, and a supportive team environment. If you love travel tech, communicating with clients, and crushing backend tasks, we’d love to meet you!



What You’ll Be Doing:

Sabre Magic: Handle ticketing, including issuance, reissuance, and complex exchanges.

Client Care: Communicate warmly and professionally with clients via WhatsApp,
, and phone.

Industry Outreach: Reach out to vendors and call airlines to advocate for our clients as needed.

Backend Support: Keep things running smoothly with proactive, detail-oriented behind-the-scenes work.



What We’re Looking For:

 Strong, hands-on Sabre GDS ticketing experience.

 Excellent written and spoken English.

 A positive attitude, a proactive mindset, and a sharp eye for detail.



How to Apply 

We know video applications can feel a little intimidating, but please don't stress about this! We aren't looking for a Hollywood production, perfect lighting, or editing. A casual, unscripted selfie-video taken right from your phone is exactly what we want.

Stumble over your words? Dog barks in the background? No problem at all! We just want to get to know the real human behind the application.

In a quick 2 to 3-minute video, just say hi and tell us:

 1. Your Journey: Walk us quickly through your recent workplaces, how long were you there and what were your main responsibilities?

 2. Your Skills: How would you rate your Sabre skills from 1 to 10, and what kind of Sabre tasks do you handle most often?

 3. Your Style: How would you rate your English skills (written and verbal) from 1 to 10? Also, let us know what you enjoy more: talking with people, or putting your head down and focusing on backend tasks?

 4. Your Setup: Where in the world are you working from? Give us a quick description of your workspace (will you be working solo in a quiet area?). Finally, please name the specific equipment you'll be using tell us about your computer/laptop model, how many monitors you have, your internet connection, and your phone setup.

Submit your video here, and if we feel you’re a great fit, we’ll reach out to schedule a friendly interview!

title: Personal Assistant / SMM
description:
Are you a proactive, creative, and organized professional ready to help scale a fast-growing personal brand?



We are looking for a powerhouse Personal/Brand Assistant to support a high-volume entrepreneur in the Whatnot and reseller space. We aren't just selling products; we are supplying the next generation of resellers. If you know how to turn raw energy into a streamlined digital presence, we want you.



Role Overview

Status: Part-Time (20 hours/week)



Schedule: Monday – Friday, 11 AM – 3 PM EST (Strict)



Focus: Social Media Growth, Brand Organization, and Executive Admin Support



What You’ll Be Doing

The mission is simple: Take the noise and turn it into a brand. You will be the engine behind a presence across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, X 
), and
.



Content Management: Post, schedule, and organize content across all platforms.



Brand Voice: Write engaging captions, draft
s, and assist with professional outreach.



Creative Strategy: Brainstorm content ideas that resonate with the reseller community.



Digital Housekeeping: Update websites/profiles and keep projects on track.



Executive Support: Act as a high-level PA—anticipating needs before they arise and working closely with the CEO.



Who You Are

You aren't just a "task-taker"—you are a problem solver.



Socially Savvy: You understand the nuances of different platforms.



Tech Fluent: Proficient in Canva, social scheduling tools, and basic website updates.



Proactive: You don’t wait for a to-do list; you see a gap and fill it.



Reliable: You are comfortable working Eastern Standard Time (EST) to ensure real-time collaboration with leadership.



Requirements

Proven experience in Social Media Management or as a High-Level VA.



Strong English (written and verbal) is non-negotiable.



Ability to work quickly in a fast-paced, "always-on" environment.



Basic understanding of the reseller market or Whatnot ecosystem is a massive plus.





How to Apply

We value attention to detail above all else. Applicants who do not follow these instructions exactly AND INCOMPLETE ATTACHMENT  will be automatically disqualified. Please send your application to 
 with the following:



Subject Line: High-Level Virtual Assistant (Personal Brand & Operations) - [Your Name]



Resume & Cover Letter: Combined in one file/message.



Portfolio: Show us your best work (Social media feeds, graphics, or case studies).



Video Introduction: A brief video introducing yourself and your experience.



EST Confirmation: Explicitly confirm you are available to work 11 AM - 3 PM EST.



Note: We are looking for a long-term partner who can bring ideas to the table. If you're ready to help run the show, we want to hear from you!

title: Freelance Video Editor (Long-Form Podcast Content)
description:
About Us

We are a growing real estate media company specializing in high-quality video content for real estate agents, teams, and brands. Our focus is on creating engaging, professional, and modern content that helps our clients stand out—especially in long-form podcast-style videos and social media.



Role Overview

We are looking for a skilled freelance video editor to handle long-form podcast-style video content (20–60+ minutes). This includes multi-camera editing, audio syncing, pacing, and light creative enhancements to maintain viewer engagement.

This is not basic cutting—we want someone who understands storytelling, retention, and clean, modern editing styles.



Key Responsibilities:

-Edit long-form podcast videos (20–60+ minutes)

-Sync multi-camera footage and audio

-Cut and pace conversations for clarity and engagement

-Remove filler words, dead space, and mistakes

-Add basic motion graphics (intro/outro, lower thirds, name tags)

-Incorporate light zooms, punch-ins, and visual interest techniques

-Clean and balance audio (levels, noise reduction, clarity)

-Add background music where appropriate

-Export in formats optimized for YouTube and other platforms

-Collaborate and revise based on feedback



Required Skills & Experience:

-Proven experience editing long-form content (podcasts, interviews, talking-head videos)

-Strong understanding of pacing and audience retention

-DaVinci Resolve software (preferred)

-Strong attention to detail

-Ability to follow brand guidelines and editing style references

-Reliable turnaround times and communication

-Reliable internet connection

-Must have your own Dropbox account (for file delivery and collaboration)



Experience with:

-Multi-camera editing workflows

-Audio editing and cleanup

-Motion graphics 

-Color correction and grading skills

-Thumbnail cover design and creation





Bonus (Nice to Have)

-Experience editing real estate content

-Ability to create short-form clips from long-form content

-Familiarity with YouTube optimization (cuts, hooks, pacing)



Compensation

-Competitive per-project or per-video rate (based on experience)

-Opportunity for consistent, ongoing work



How to Apply

Please include:

Links to your best 2–3 sample videos (long-form podcast/interview content multi camera/person preferred). ONLY 2-3 LINKS PLEASE. ANYTHING MORE AND YOUR APPLICATION WILL NOT BE REVIEWED!!!

Your typical turnaround time for a 30–60 minute video

Your rate (per video)

The video editing hardware and software you’re using



Important: Start your application with the word "MKREPodcastEditor" so we know you read the full job description.



What We’re Looking For

Someone reliable, detail-oriented, and easy to work with. We value editors who think beyond just cutting clips and can help improve the overall quality and flow of content.

If you’re looking for consistent work and want to grow with a media-focused real estate brand, we want to hear from you.

title: Transaction Coordinator
description:
Summary

We are a US land investment company looking for a Transaction Coordinator to work directly with the owner on due diligence for signed deals.



This is a new role. I need someone who has done real estate transaction work before, is highly organized, and flexible enough to help shape the role as we go.



Your Responsibilities:



- Reach out to title companies and coordinate title work

- Research and vet local realtors for each deal

- Research engineers, soil scientists, and surveyors for due diligence

- Contact county offices for zoning, planning, and permitting questions

- Follow up on signed deals and push them through to close

- Public records research and seller contact verification

- Occasional admin work (CRM updates, light data entry)



Requirements:



- Prior real estate transaction coordination experience

- Experience working with counties and public records

- Excellent English communication (written & verbal)

- Extremely high attention to detail

- Highly organized, self-starter, works independently with minimal supervision

- Coachable and flexible — this is a new role and will evolve



Bonus Experience (highly favorable):



- AI-forward — comfortable using AI tools day-to-day

- Land investing or land-specific real estate experience

- GIS mapping tools and county GIS systems

- Zoning and land development knowledge

- Real estate research, underwriting, or data analysis

- Public records research and lead-data enrichment



Application Requirements:



To apply, please submit:



- A 1–2 minute video introducing yourself & your experience

- Internet speed test screenshot

- Answer this question: "Why are you a strong fit for this role?"



Compensation:



- $4–$7 per hour, based on experience

- 60-day evaluation period. After 60 days, everything gets reevaluated with potential for commissions

- Starting at 30 hrs/week with the opportunity to move to 40 hrs (full-time) based on performance

- Long-term position with growth opportunities



We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who wants to grow with our company and play a key role in our acquisitions and due diligence process.



—



Please include your favorite food at the start of your response.

title: Customer Service Manager
description:
Customer Service Specialist (Dropshipping) 

We are a fast-growing D2C e-commerce fashion business looking for an experienced Customer Service Manager. This is not entry-level: you must have strong dropshipping experience and be confident handling complex cases. You’ll start hands-on (doing everything yourself) and then move into managing CS reps and supply chain. No management experience = please don’t apply.

Your responsibilities

Handle and follow up on customer
s (primarily french for now, occasionally English)





Professionally manage angry or frustrated customers and resolve situations without escalation

Track refunds and returns in Google Sheets to keep everything organized

 When an order issue arises, you will raise it in the supplier group and help resolve it

title: Youtube Scriptwriter - AI & Finance Niche [Tutorials]
description:
Hey! We're looking for an "AI tech" scriptwriter for our YouTube channel who understands YouTube retention and how to make a 10–16 minute educational video that feels fast, engaging, and bingeable.



Niche: AI & Finance (Tutorial videos about AI characters, video generation, image generation, AI monetization)



Competitors:







*All of our scripts are talking head videos. If you have experience in this niche - GREAT! If not, don't worry, we also provide full training. 



Your job:

- Create a compelling script based on the given topic (usually includes a full 10-20 minute Loom recording explaining steps and possible structure)

- Research on video topic (Often already provided)

- Find relevant resources & propose B-rolls

- Delivery in 48 hours



AI Usage Policy

We recognize that AI tools are part of modern workflows and may be used as support in this role. However, all scripts must sound fully human, demonstrate genuine understanding of the topic, and be written for engagement and clarity. Submissions that are clearly AI-generated without thoughtful human input will not be accepted. Every script will be reviewed to ensure it meets these standards.



Deliverables



• Scripts for 10–16 minute YouTube videos

• We aim to start with 2 videos per week



How to Apply



Please include:

1. Portfolio

Links to relevant TOP 3 (!) YouTube scripts or finished videos (Talking-Head, OR AI, tech, or business - similar to competitors.) 

2. Capacity

If you're open to working part-time or you prefer pay per project

3. Long-Term Mindset

We’re building a team and introducing performance bonuses for videos that hit targets. Let us know if you’re interested in growing with the channel.

4. The Secret Word

Start your application with “TOP” so we know you’ve read the full brief.

title: Executive Assistant to UK Company Ceo
description:
Important – Read Before Applying



Serious applicants only.



A minimum of 25 application points is required to be considered for this role.



Please do not apply if you do not meet this requirement.



Applications that do not meet the minimum criteria will be automatically rejected.



We are only looking for candidates who meet the experience and performance standards outlined in this role.





-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





Full-Time | Remote

Monday to Friday, 9:00am – 5:00pm (UK Time)



We are a finance management firm based in Europe

Role Description:



This is a full-time remote role for an Executive Assistant (Operations & Sales Support).



The Executive Assistant will act as the right hand to the Director, responsible for managing daily operations, supporting sales activity, and ensuring the business runs efficiently.



Responsibilities include managing schedules, handling communication, tracking tasks and performance, supporting CRM updates, and ensuring all operational processes are followed.



This is not a basic administrative role — this position requires someone who can take ownership, manage priorities, and ensure execution across the business.



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Qualifications



• Minimum 4+ years consistent experience (2023–2026) in an Executive Assistant or operations-focused role

• Strong experience in Executive Administrative Assistance and high-level business support

• Proven ability to manage diaries, schedules, meetings, and executive priorities

• Experience supporting operations, sales processes, or workflow coordination

• Strong understanding of CRM systems, pipelines, and task tracking

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills

• High attention to detail and organisational ability

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple responsibilities

• Proficiency in Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, and CRM tools

• Relevant degree or business-related qualification preferred



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Key Responsibilities



• Manage the Director’s daily schedule and priorities

• Handle all business
s and communications

• Track tasks, follow-ups, and ensure completion

• Monitor CRM and maintain accurate data

• Support sales processes and lead follow-up

• Coordinate internal communication and team activity

• Track KPIs, targets, and performance

• Ensure operations run smoothly across the business



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Working Hours



Full-Time

Monday to Friday

9:00am – 5:00pm (UK Time)



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Important Requirements



• You must have recent, consistent Executive Assistant experience (2023–2026)

• This role requires someone who can manage operations, not just admin tasks

• You must be comfortable handling
s, calls, CRM, and task tracking

• You must be fully available during working hours



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Application Conditions



• Do not apply if you currently have another full-time job

• This role requires full attention during working hours

• We are only considering candidates with real, verifiable experience

• References will be checked



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



What We Are Looking For



We are looking for a high-level Executive Assistant who can operate as the right hand to the Director.



You must:



• Take ownership of tasks without supervision

• Keep operations organised and moving

• Manage pressure and multiple priorities

• Maintain professionalism and confidentiality at all times



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Application Requirements

SUBJECTLINE : EA-CCEO

To be considered, you must include:

1. Companies worked for in 2023, 2024, 2025, and 2026 and your role within the company

2. Your current role and daily responsibilities as of today

3. Your experience supporting executives and managing operations

4. Tools and systems you have used (CRM, scheduling tools, etc.)

5. Your WhatsApp contact number



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Events Administrator/Lead generation
description:
Hours: 38 hours/week (full-time)



Rate: $200/week (~$5.26/hour), with pay review after 3 months for strong performers



Schedule: Monday–Friday, 1pm–8pm Manila time. Planning calls Monday & Friday.



Bonuses: 13th month pay (paid in December, pro-rated for time worked)



Start: Two-week paid trial, then ongoing if it's a good fit



About us

The Design Forums connects architects & interior designers across the UK and Ireland through a portfolio of industry events including The Architects Forums, The Design Forums and Design Soiree. We organise RIBA-accredited CPD seminars, product showcases and networking events in over 12 cities. We're looking for a full-time VA to support our growing events calendar with LinkedIn outreach, event logistics and invoice management.



Our Websites: 









The role



LinkedIn outreach — Sending connection requests and follow-up messages to a defined list of target prospects using approved templates. You'll work from our LinkedIn account via a shared browser setup. Must understand LinkedIn's weekly limits and how to keep an account in good standing.

Event logistics coordination — Supporting the planning and delivery of events including liaising with attendees, collecting requirements (dietary needs, accessibility, timings), chasing confirmations, and keeping our CRM up to date.

Invoice chasing — Polite, professional follow-ups with clients on overdue invoices. You'll work from a weekly aged debtors report we provide.





Working pattern



38 hours per week, Monday to Friday



Core hours: 1pm–8pm Manila time (= 6am–1pm Dublin during Irish summer; 5am–12pm Dublin during Irish winter)



Planning calls every Monday and Friday at 5pm Manila / 10am Dublin — Monday to plan the week ahead, Friday to review

Additional check-in calls as and when required throughout the week

Short daily update
 (3 bullet points: what I did today / what I'm doing tomorrow / anything blocking me)

Most of your day is async — you'll work through the task list independently between calls





Tools & systems



You'll use our VOIP phone system for all outbound calls (we provide access)

You'll use our CRM for logging activity, tracking contacts, and managing follow-ups

Training will be provided on both systems, but the expectation is that you can hit the ground running — you should be comfortable learning new software quickly and working independently from day one





Equipment & setup required



Dedicated home office or quiet workspace (no background noise on calls)

Professional headset with clear microphone

Stable, reliable internet connection 

Backup internet option (mobile hotspot) in case of outages

Working computer with webcam for video calls





Who we're looking for



2+ years' VA experience, ideally with a Western client

Strong written and spoken English — your messages and calls represent our business

Confident on outbound calls — friendly, professional, not timid

Detail-oriented; events work means small mistakes have real consequences

Self-starter who can manage their own workload without constant supervision



Bonus if you have:



Experience in events, hospitality, or B2B sales support

Experience with 
, or another CRM





Pay & progression



$200/week during the two-week paid trial

Continued at $200/week after a successful trial

Pay review at 3 months with a rise for excellent performance



13th month bonus paid in December (pro-rated for time worked) — yours from your first month

Paid via Wise or PayPal, weekly or fortnightly





To apply, please send a WhatsApp message to 
mentioning my name (Mike) and the company (The Design Forums), along with:



A short intro (text or 1-min voice note/video — voice or video preferred)



Applications  that don't mention my name and the company, won't be reviewed — it's how I filter for people who actually read job posts.



If your reply looks like a good fit, the next step will be a short video interview. We arte hoping for an immediete start.



Looking forward to hearing from you.



Mike

The Design Forums

title: AI Content Operator (Short Form Ads + Growth Path to Media Buyer)
description:
We're not hiring a video editor.



We're hiring someone who wants to become a high-earning operator in paid ads.



You'll start by creating short-form ad creatives.



If you're good, you'll move into running campaigns and managing ad spend.



What This Role Really Is

----------------------

You'll be part of a team that produces high-volume TikTok / Shorts ad creatives.



Your job is simple:

- Turn ideas into videos that get clicks

- Make lots of variations fast

- Find what works, then double down



This is not about making things "look nice."

This is about making content that performs.



What You'll Do Daily

----------------------

- Create short-form videos (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)

- Build strong hooks in the first 1-3 seconds

- Generate UGC-style clips and B-roll using AI

- Test different angles, pacing, and formats

- Iterate based on performance feedback



What We Actually Care About

----------------------

- You understand what makes people stop scrolling

- You've made videos that perform, not just look good

- You move fast and can produce multiple variations daily

- You study trends and adapt quickly

- You think in terms of CTR, retention, and testing



Tools You Should Already Use

----------------------

Schedule

----------------------

Pay + Growth Opportunity

----------------------

- Competitive base pay

- Bonuses for winning creatives

- Real upside:



If you consistently create winning ads, you will be trained to become a media buyer.



That means:

- Running paid ad campaigns

- Earning significantly more based on performance



We promote from within.

Top performers don't stay editors.



How to Apply

title: Content Marketing & E-commerce Optimization Lead (SEO, AEO and GEO)
description:
Role Overview



Jomingo is a leading Singaporean natural personal care brand dedicated to sustainable, high-performance skincare. We are looking for a forward-thinking Content Marketing & E-commerce Optimization Lead to take our digital presence into the next generation of search.



You will be responsible for driving Search Engine Optimization (SEO), Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) strategies. Your goal is to improve Jomingo's visibility and authority across traditional search engines and AI-driven discovery platforms (like Gemini, Perplexity, and ChatGPT), ensuring our brand surfaces in conversational interfaces and AI-generated answers globally.



Key Responsibilities



1. Strategy & Planning



Define and execute a holistic SEO, AEO, and GEO strategy aligned with Jomingo’s brand and content priorities.



Anticipate shifts in the AI discovery ecosystem (generative search, AI assistants, voice search) and translate them into actionable growth approaches.



Partner with the founder and creative teams to embed optimization best practices from planning through execution.



2. SEO & Technical Optimization



Lead on-page, off-page, and technical SEO improvements, including site structure, metadata, internal linking, and schema markup on Shopify.



Monitor crawlability, indexation, and site health, proactively resolving technical issues.



Ensure SEO requirements are incorporated into CMS updates and new feature releases.



3. AEO & GEO Enablement



Optimize content and data structures to improve visibility in AI-generated answers, featured snippets, and voice responses.



Develop frameworks for structuring content to support entity recognition, topical authority, and trusted source signals.



Adapt content formats, tone, and structure specifically for AI-driven discovery engines.



4. Content & Editorial Optimization



Provide guidance for content creation, including keyword intent mapping, topic clustering, and semantic optimization.



Ensure evergreen and campaign content is optimized for discoverability and relevance across all digital channels.



Support scalable optimization frameworks for localized market efforts.



5. Performance & Analytics



Define KPIs and measurement frameworks for SEO, AEO, and GEO performance.



Track rankings, visibility, and AI-surface performance, translating data into clear, actionable recommendations.



Produce regular reports highlighting opportunities, risks, and impact on brand acquisition.



Role Requirements



Shopify Expertise: Proven experience optimizing E-commerce stores specifically on the Shopify platform.



AI Search Fluency: Deep understanding of how LLMs and Generative Search Engines (GEO) rank and cite brands.



Technical Proficiency: Strong grasp of Schema Markup (JSON-LD), site architecture, and Core Web Vitals.



Analytical Mindset: Ability to translate complex data from GA4, Search Console, and AI tracking tools into business growth.



Why Join Jomingo?



Work with Impact: Work directly with the Founder of the brand; your voice and strategy will directly shape the company’s future.



Flexible Autonomy: Enjoy flexible working hours—we value results and target achievement over "clock-in" times.



Timezone Alignment: We operate on the same timezone (Singapore/Philippines), ensuring seamless communication and no late-night meetings.



Agile Environment: No complex organizational structures or red tape; we move fast and value innovation.

Good communication and daily reporting

Iphone 10+

Good internet connection

Warmed-up Reddit account(s) ready to use

Full subreddit list with notes on rules/posting style per sub

Content sourced and ready to post daily

Antidetect browser + proxy (just log in and go)

Posting guidelines and SOPs



To apply, send the followiing:  a written message explaining your Reddit experience and why you'd be good at this. Include past work experience/references if you have any. Include the word REDDIT2026 so I know you read this. Name 5 subreddits you'd post on for a big breasted female content creator and explain why. What's your daily availability and timezone. Applications who don't include these will not be considered.

title: Creative Strategist (Dropshipping E-Commerce)
description:
Rate: $6/hour

Schedule: Monday–Friday

Type: Long-term | Remote



About Us

We are a fast-scaling health & beauty e-commerce brand operating a high-volume dropshipping model and generating multiple 7 figures annually. Our focus is performance-driven, image-based creatives built to scale aggressively.

We are now building the next phase of our growth — and we’re looking for a Senior Creative Strategist who can take full ownership of our creative direction and lead our team to 8-figure scale.



This is not a junior role. This is for someone ready to step into leadership and long-term growth.



The Role

You will own and drive the creative strategy of the brand. Your responsibility goes beyond ideas — you will lead execution, manage a team, and ensure performance.



Core Responsibilities:

• Develop, test, and scale winning creative strategies and ad angles

• Create detailed, conversion-focused briefs for the editing team

• Lead, mentor, and manage a team of 7+ video/image editors

• Research competitors and proactively identify new creative opportunities

• Collaborate directly with the founder and media buying team

• Build systems to improve creative output and efficiency

• Take accountability for creative KPIs and overall performance



Who This Role Is For:

We are looking for someone ambitious, proactive, and performance-obsessed.



You should:

• Take initiative without waiting for instructions

• Apply feedback quickly and continuously improve

• Think both strategically and creatively

• Be deeply interested in performance marketing and paid social

• Treat the business like your own

• Want to grow into a high-level strategic leadership role



This role is not for passive executors.

We are building a high-performance team.



Preferred Experience (Not Required):

• DTC / B2C health & beauty e-commerce

• Creative strategy for Meta Ads

• Strong marketing copywriting

• Understanding of hooks, angles, positioning, and scaling creatives

• Portfolio of creative briefs, ads, or strategy work



We hire for drive and potential.

If you are highly motivated, learn fast, and want long-term growth — we will invest in you.



What We Offer:

• Full-time, long-term role

• Clear path to senior strategic leadership

• Direct mentorship from the founder

• Opportunity to lead and scale a creative department

• Performance-based bonuses

• Potential profit share for proven results



How to Apply (Follow Exactly):

Complete the mandatory application form:  

Submit your portfolio (ad concepts, briefs, creatives, or analyses)



Include:

• A short explanation of why you are the right candidate

• Your expected monthly salary

Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

If you're ready to take ownership, lead a team, and build something significant — we’re ready to meet you.

description:
We are looking for a part-time Instagram Content & Growth Manager for Meiyodeck, a premium trading card accessories brand selling mainly on Amazon.



The role is focused on managing our Instagram business account, creating high-quality product content, growing engagement, and helping guide customers from Instagram to our Amazon store.



Responsibilities:

- Create Instagram posts, reels, stories, and carousels

- Use real product images or accurate product-based visuals

- Write captions, hooks, and hashtags

- Build a simple content calendar

- Create engagement-focused content for collectors

- Suggest content ideas based on trends and competitors

- Track basic performance and improve based on results



Requirements:

- Experience managing Instagram business accounts

- Strong visual taste

- Good English writing

- Experience with product or ecommerce content

- Canva and/or CapCut experience

- Reliable, proactive, and able to work independently



Nice to have:

Experience with Amazon brands, collectibles, Pokémon, sports cards, TCG, UGC content, ChatGPT, AI image tools, or Instagram analytics.



Important:

AI tools are allowed, but the product must look realistic and match the actual Meiyodeck product. No fake-looking product images, fake followers, spammy captions, misleading claims, or risky growth tactics.



This is a part-time freelance role to start. Budget is $200–$600/month depending on experience and quality. During the first 30 days, all posts and captions must be approved before publishing.

This is a true ground-up build. Everything starts from zero, and we’re looking for one talented, high-energy person in the Philippines to own it and drive it to success. If you love building, creating viral content, and getting paid when the sales roll in, this is your chance to be the key player who makes it happen.

Set up and optimize sales channels including Shopify + Amazon

Create and run high-converting TikTok ads (you’ll shoot, edit, and optimize the videos yourself — this is where the fun and virality happens)

Manage and scale
 & Instagram ads in Meta Ads Manager

Combine killer creative + smart ad strategy to drive traffic, conversions, and real revenue

 & Instagram ads

Self-motivated, love challenges, and can work independently

Excellent English communication (written and spoken)

Compensation & Why This Pays Better Than Most Remote Roles

Generous, uncapped sales commission — the more the store and ads perform, the more you earn. Real upside as we scale!

mbers move up fast)

Implementing copy in multiple European languages (Dutch, German, French, Spanish, Swedish, etc.) — you don't need to speak any of them, but you need to copy-paste accurately and respect language-specific formatting (e.g. "€24,95" with comma for NL/DE, "29,95kr" for SE, "29,95€" for DE)

Adding GIFs, product images, FB-style comment blocks, scoring cards, review sections



Setting up Shopify product pages with correct SKU structure



Installing tracking (we use wetracked) and creating automations



Mobile-first QA — every funnel must look perfect on mobile before going live

Funnelish



Shopify (basic product setup, variants, SKUs)



Web design & page layout (clean, minimal, conversion-focused)



Confident using AI tools to create product photos, videos, and write/refine copy independently



English: B2 or higher (clear written communication is essential)



BONUS SKILLS (not required, but a big plus):



Experience with health/wellness or supplement dropshipping



Familiarity with Meta Ads compliance (knowing what claims trigger ad rejections)



Basic Canva or Photoshop for quick image edits



Experience working with multi-language European stores

Your full name and timezone

3 funnels you've built — links to live URLs (not screenshots, not "I built for a client and can't share"). Any language is fine.

Which page builders you've used and how many funnels you've built in each

Your fastest internet speed test result (screenshot from 
 or speedtest.net)

Start your message with the word "PERFECTIONIST" so we know you read this entire post
