title: Aesthetic Social Media Manager – Plastic Surgery (Before/After + Paid Ads + High-End Branding)
description:
We are a Beverly Hills plastic surgery practice seeking a high-level Social Media Manager with experience in aesthetic medicine, before/after organization, and paid marketing (PPC). This role includes content creation, before/after photo management, and paid advertising. This is NOT a basic posting job. We are looking for someone who understands luxury branding and patient conversion.



Responsibilities: Create and manage Instagram, TikTok, and
 content. Produce high-end reels and posts that attract real patients. Maintain a clean, luxury aesthetic appropriate for a Beverly Hills plastic surgery practice. Organize before and after photos systematically. Ensure proper lighting consistency, cropping, alignment, labeling, and categorization. Distribute before and after content across Instagram, TikTok,
, RealSelf, and provide to our website management team. Manage and run paid advertising campaigns on Instagram,
, and Google Ads for medspa and aesthetic services. Optimize campaigns for leads and conversions, not just clicks. Track and report performance.



Requirements: Please include a list of your previous employment, including dates of employment, exact duties and responsibilities, company name, and your supervisor’s name and company contact information.



Experience with plastic surgery or medspa marketing. Strong understanding of before and after presentation. Experience running paid ads on Meta (Instagram/Facebook) and Google. Skilled in tools such as CapCut, Adobe, Photoshop or equivalent. Not Canva-only.



Do not apply if: You only use Canva templates. You have no before and after experience. You have never run paid ads. You cannot show real accounts you personally managed.



Required test: Create one Instagram post for a Beverly Hills plastic surgeon. 1) Before and after post using any sample images, must look real, clean, and high-end. 2) Write a professional caption including a call to action. 3) Provide one reel idea that would attract patients.



Required submission format: 1) Three Instagram accounts you personally managed. 2) One example of organized before and after work (folder system or samples). 3) One paid ad campaign you ran (results or screenshots preferred). 4) The test assignment. 5) List of tools you use.

title: AI Video Production VA
description:
We Are Hiring!

AI Video Production Assistant

Full-Time | Serious Applicants Only



We operate a growing network of YouTube channels and publish content daily across multiple niches. To keep up with demand, we're adding a dedicated production assistant to our team — someone who wants to stick around, master a workflow, and build something long-term with us.



You won't be creating content from scratch. You'll be following a clear, repeatable process — handling scripting, video production, and publishing using a set of AI tools we'll train you on from day one. It takes time to learn. It takes discipline to execute daily. But for the right person, it's a stable, rewarding role with real room to grow.



This is not for people looking for a side gig or a quick paycheck. This is for someone ready to dedicate themselves fully.



What We Need

• Full-time availability — 8 hours a day

• Patience and commitment during the learning phase

• Obsessive attention to detail

• Ability to work independently and stay on track without supervision

• Comfortable picking up new AI tools quickly

• Stable internet connection, always reachable during work hours

• Solid written English skills

• Long-term only — we invest in people who invest in us



Bonus Points

• Familiarity with YouTube or content workflows

• Hands-on experience with AI tools

• Background in VA or operations work



Compensation

Base: $300 USD/month + performance bonuses

2-month review with potential pay increase

All tools provided and paid for — nothing comes out of your pocket



To Apply

Send a DM starting with the word 'COMMITTED' (so we know you read everything). Include: a quick intro and your location, your hours and timezone, any relevant experience, and what makes you the right fit for a demanding, long-term role.



Only apply if this is your primary focus. We're building a team — not a roster of side hustlers.

title: High-Volume Recruiter- Construction, Engineering, Mining  Sectors
description:
Role: High-Volume Recruitment Specialist- for Construction, Engineering,  Heavy Industry, Mining /Oil and Gas roles. 

Location: 100% Remote - WFH

Hours: 40 hrs per week. - 9am - 5pm AEST> 

Region: Perth, WA - Australia 

Monthly Salary: 55 - 60k PHP + Generous Bonus + Perks + Paid Leave

Contract: Independent Contractor - Ongoing



Our Client

Our Client is a specialist recruitment and workforce solutions provider, supporting clients across heavy industry sectors including construction, engineering, mining, and oil & gas. With a strong reputation for delivering quality talent at scale, supporting critical projects, shutdowns, and ongoing workforce needs.





The Role

We are seeking an experienced Talent Acquisition Specialist to join our team, focused on delivering high-volume recruitment across multiple heavy industry sectors. This role will play a key part in sourcing, mobilising, and managing large workforces for major projects, including FIFO assignments and shutdown campaigns.



This is a fast-paced, delivery-focused position suited to someone agile who thrives in high-volume environments and understands the complexities of workforce mobilisation.



Key Responsibilities. 



- Manage end-to-end recruitment across high-volume roles within construction, engineering, mining, and oil & gas

- Deliver bulk hiring campaigns for project-based and shutdown requirements

- Source and engage candidates through multiple channels, including job boards, databases, referrals, and direct outreach

- Screen and assess candidates efficiently while maintaining quality standards

- Coordinate workforce mobilisation, including compliance, documentation, and onboarding requirements. 

- Build and manage a pipeline of compliant and "site ready" candidates. 

- Manage FIFO recruitment processes, including logistics and candidate readiness

- Partner with internal stakeholders to understand workforce needs and timelines

- Maintain accurate candidate records and reporting within ATS/CRM systems. Bullhorn. 

- Ensure a strong candidate experience throughout the recruitment lifecycle

- Support workforce planning and pipeline development for upcoming projects



Requirements To Apply. 

- 3+ years proven experience in high volume recruitment, in heavy industry sectors (construction/engineering/mining/oil and gas). 

- 2 + years previous experience with International Recruitment (Clients and Candidates outside of PH). 

- Excellent communication skills in English both written and verbal. 

- High degree of confidence talking to candidates via phone. 

- Experience using recruitment tools ATS/CRM systems such as Bullhorn or similar. 



Ideal Candidates. 

- Have previous experience with an Australian recruitment and workforce solutions company. 

- Strong understanding of construction, engineering, mining, and/or oil & gas recruitment

- Experience recruiting for FIFO roles and managing workforce mobilisation

- Demonstrated experience supporting shutdowns or project-based hiring campaigns

- Ability to manage multiple roles and tight deadlines in a fast-paced environment

- Strong stakeholder management and communication skills

- Highly organised with strong attention to detail



Why Apply?

Opportunity to work with a well-established and growing recruitment business. 

Long-term stable role. 

Exposure to major projects across key industry sectors.

Collaborative and supportive team environment.

Competitive salary and performance incentives.

Career growth within a specialist recruitment environment.



How to Apply. 

- Please link your most updated CV. 

- Please provide a brief overview of your most relevant experience for the client and role. 

- Please highlight Australian experience. 

- Provide an overview of your complete WFH Set-Up including device/internet speed test/ back-up internet options and back-up power options. 

- Please provide a brief intro video- 3 minutes Max.

title: Amazon Growth Operator for Amazon FBA Brand
description:
We are hiring an Amazon Growth Operator for our Amazon FBA brand.



This is not a basic PPC role.



You will help manage Amazon PPC, organic keyword ranking, product launches, product relaunches, conversion rate, TACOS, keyword tracking, and coordination with our creator/inbox VA.



We need someone who understands that PPC is not just about lowering ACOS. PPC should help drive profitable growth, improve organic ranking, and support the overall product strategy.



You will be responsible for:



Managing Sponsored Products campaigns.

Tracking organic keyword rankings.

Choosing which keywords should be pushed for ranking.

Monitoring CTR, CVR, CPC, ACOS, TACOS, sessions, and unit session percentage.

Creating weekly action plans for each product.

Identifying when a product has a traffic problem, conversion problem, or ranking problem.

Coordinating with our creator/inbox VA so they know which products and keywords need support.

Helping execute launch and relaunch plans.

Search term harvesting and negative keyword management.

Flagging listing issues that hurt conversion, including price, reviews, main image, coupon, title, images, and A+ content.



Requirements:



Experience with Amazon Seller Central.

Experience with Amazon Campaign Manager.

Experience with Helium 10 or similar keyword tools.

Strong spreadsheet skills.

Good English.

Strong analytical thinking.

Ability to manage tasks and communicate clearly with another VA.

Ability to follow SOPs and improve them over time.



To apply, please answer:





If we want to rank for 1 keyword, how would you set up the Sponsored Products campaign?



How would you d
 which keyword deserves external support?



Have you ever managed or coordinated with another VA? Give an example.



Please send C.V!!



Experience with Amazon Seller Central, Campaign Manager, Helium 10, keyword research, and PPC reports is required.

title: AI-Augmented Laravel + Vue 2 Developer / Engineer (EU property-tech, remote)
description:
Title:

AI-Augmented Laravel + Vue 2 Developer / Engineer (EU property-tech, remote)



Role

We are looking for a strong, reliable engineer who likes to move fast with AI tools and still ships carefully. We care heavily about clear communication, good decisions, and a clean trial result.



About us

We are a European property-tech company. We maintain a long-running Laravel application with Blade, Vue 2, Bootstrap, and tenant-scoped data patterns. We use GitLab merge requests. We care about security, privacy, and small reviewable changes.



How we work

We use an AI-assisted development workflow. You are expected to use coding assistants to speed up analysis and implementation, but you treat generated output as draft work: clarify scope, plan the change, verify behaviour, keep diffs small, and prove changes with sensible and thorough checks and testing before review.



This role is a great fit if you like turning requirements into a short plan, using AI where it helps, keeping changes easy to review, and checking your work before you ask for feedback. It is not a fit if you want to ship large unreviewed blocks of AI-generated code.



What you will do

- Deliver scoped changes on a mature Laravel + Vue 2 codebase using AI-assisted methods safely.

- Open merge requests with clear descriptions, scoped commits, and tests where applicable.

- Communicate in writing about plan, trade-offs, and verification steps.



Requirements

- Demonstrable AI-assisted workflow in real product work (you can explain it concretely).

- Comfortable working in Laravel in a larger codebase, including reading and navigating existing code you did not write yourself.

- Comfortable with Vue 2 in production, or strong Vue experience with a clear plan to work within Vue 2 patterns in this codebase.

- Comfortable with Blade templates and web security (escaping, CSRF, safe handling of user input).

- Solid Git habits: branches, scoped commits, merge request workflow.

- Written English strong enough for async work with EU stakeholders.

- Ideally 4 to 6 hours overlap per workday with CET business hours (Monday to Friday). Please state your timezone and the CET window you can reliably cover each workday.



Nice to have

- AI-assisted work on legacy codebases (careful refactors, incremental upgrades, tenant-scoped features).

- Laravel Mix / Webpack and Docker-based local builds.

- Multi-tenant SaaS experience.



Trial (before any production access)

We run a mini-trial on a sandbox repository that mirrors our stack patterns but contains no production code or customer data. Timebox is about 4 to 6 hours, agreed upfront.



You may use AI tools during the trial, but you must not paste secrets, customer data, production logs, or private business information into external tools. You must be able to explain and defend everything you submit.



How to apply (English, no template letters)

1) Your current AI-assisted workflow: how you scope prompts, verify output, and prevent scope creep.

2) One example where an AI tool gave a wrong or risky suggestion. How did you catch it?

3) Either (A) walk us through one concrete merge request or commit you authored where AI was your primary tool: what you prompted, what came back, and what you changed before merge, or (B) if you cannot share a link, describe your first 30 minutes on an unfamiliar legacy Laravel/Vue task before you edit code.

4) How do you keep AI-assisted changes small and reviewable in a legacy monolith?

5) Multi-tenant safety: what checks would you do before changing a query that returns tenant-owned records?

6) What information must never be pasted into external AI tools? Name categories, not examples from real projects.



Do not apply if

- You are not the person who will do the work.

- You ship AI output without verification.

- You cannot describe your workflow concretely.

- You only have Vue 3 experience and cannot commit to Vue 2 patterns in this codebase.

- You would paste secrets, production logs, or customer data into external tools.

title: Klaviyo Email Marketing Lead — Fast-Moving DTC Brand
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION:



Growing DTC ecommerce brand in the DACH market. Single hero product with strong emotional positioning targeting women 18–27. Front-end is performing.
 is not — and we are heading into our peak season (May–August). We need someone to take over Klaviyo and turn it into a real revenue channel, fast.



The honest situation:



We have Klaviyo set up with flows live, but the channel barely contributes revenue. Current execution feels generic — AI-looking visuals, weak copy, no brand voice. We are not looking for someone to maintain this. We need someone to audit it properly, rebuild what is broken, and start shipping campaigns that actually work.



How we want to start:

Week 1: Full audit of the entire Klaviyo account — existing flows, past campaigns, list health, segments, deliverability. Findings document with clear priorities for what to fix first.

Week 1–2: First flow rebuild goes live (your call which one to prioritize, you justify the decision based on the audit).

Week 2–3: First campaign goes out. Second flow rebuilt.

From there: Weekly campaign cadence, ongoing flow optimization, monthly performance report with insights and next steps.

We are not a huge brand. We move fast. We don't need three weeks of analysis before anything ships.

What you will own:

Klaviyo strategy and execution end-to-end. All flows: Welcome, Abandoned Cart, Browse, Post-Purchase, Win-Back. Weekly campaigns tied to brand storytelling, seasonality, and product moments — not discount-spam. Segmentation strategy for a single-product brand. A/B testing on subject lines, send times, creative. Customer lifecycle communication that also reduces support tickets and disputes.



What you need:

Minimum 2 years hands-on Klaviyo for ecommerce brands. At least one case study with concrete numbers (flow revenue, RPR, before/after). Strong English copywriting — our German team handles final localization, you write hooks, structure, English version. Strategic thinking and ownership — you propose, ship, report. Brand-led
 background, not discount-only.



What we don't want:

AI-generated visuals. Discount-only campaigns. Template-based execution. Slow communicators.



Compensation & growth path:

We start hourly so we both confirm fit. Strong performers move to a monthly retainer within 90 days — meaning more stable income, more ownership, and real upside as the brand scales. This role is built to grow with the business.



Communication:

Daily availability on Slack or WhatsApp during your working hours. Reply to messages within a few hours on workdays. Weekly 15-minute sync.



How to apply:

Start your application with the word MOMENTS. Then answer:



Show me one flow you rebuilt for an ecom brand with before/after numbers (open rate, click rate, RPR, total flow revenue).

What is your current weekly client load and how soon could you start?

Send me one example of a non-discount campaign
 you wrote. Raw copy is fine.



Applications missing the codeword, numbers in Q1, or a writing sample in Q3 will be deleted without reply.

title: Client Accounting Manager
description:
Client Accounting Manager



***To apply you must read the entire post and follow the directions at the bottom***



Location: Remote

Type: Full-time (40 hours/week, 6am–2pm CST)

Reports To: CEO



About Us

Out of Site Bookkeeping is a fast-growing, client-focused bookkeeping firm dedicated to helping small businesses succeed. We pride ourselves on our collaborative, supportive culture and our commitment to continuous improvement. Join a team where your expertise and leadership will be valued!



Position Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Client Accounting Manager to provide high level client support and project management, as well as train and manage our bookkeeping team. The ideal candidate is a natural leader with exceptional communication skills, a continuous improvement mindset, and a passion for delivering outstanding client experiences. You’ll thrive under deadlines, support your team, and ensure the highest standards of service for our clients.



Key Responsibilities

1. Team Training & Development:

   Mentor, train, and support the bookkeeping team to foster skill development, accountability, and a collaborative culture. Provide regular feedback and training to help team members reach their full potential and keep up on new bookkeeping best practices.

2. Quality Control & Process Optimization:

   Oversee the accuracy and compliance of all client bookkeeping work. Conduct regular quality checks, update and maintain SOPs and best practices, and lead process improvements to enhance efficiency and minimize errors.

3. Client Project Management:

   Guide client projects from onboarding to completion by outlining project tasks and milestones for the team to fulfill. Assist bookkeepers with high level entries (and provide training) to keep projects on track. Follow up with clients to obtain documents or other information necessary to keep on track. 



Qualifications

- Degree in accounting or a related field

- Strong knowledge of accounting principles and practices

- Excellent attention to detail, analytical, and problem-solving skills

- Excellent verbal and written English; must be easily understood by US-based clients

- Strong teamwork and independent work abilities

- Proficiency with Microsoft Office Suite and Google GSuite, especially Excel/Sheets

- Flexible and adaptable to changing guidelines and bookkeeping practices



Experience

- Minimum 5 years of bookkeeping experience

- At least 2 years of leadership or management experience

- Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience with QuickBooks Online



Compensation & Benefits

- Training pay: $5/hr for the first ~90 days, pay rate increase based on performance during training

- 13th month pay or holiday bonuses

- Professional growth and development opportunities

- Collaborative, supportive team environment



How to Apply:

1. Reply to this job post with “World’s Best Leader” in the subject line.

2. In your response, state how many:

- years of leadership or supervisory experience you have

- years of bookkeeping experience you have

- years of hands-on experience with QuickBooks Online you have

3. Tell us one thing that sets you apart from other applicants.



***Applications that do NOT follow these instructions will be automatically disqualified without opening.

title: Accounting Manager
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a Senior Accounting Manager to lead and orchestrate the financial operations of a large-scale, global enterprise. This is not a "hands-on" role for a generalist; it is a strategic leadership position requiring a candidate who has mastered the complexities of high-volume transactions and multi-national entity management.



The successful candidate will oversee a sophisticated accounting department, providing high-level coordination across specialized functions including AP, AR, Cost Accounting, and FP&A. You will be responsible for the integrity of the group’s financial health, specifically focusing on the consolidation of multiple overseas sub-entities and ensuring seamless financial reporting at scale.



Key Responsibilities

1. Strategic Leadership & Team Management

-Directly manage and mentor a team of functional managers (AP Manager, AR Manager, Cost Manager, and FP&A Manager).

-Standardize accounting workflows across departments to ensure maximum efficiency and accuracy.

-Act as the primary bridge between technical accounting and strategic financial planning.



2. Global Consolidation & Reporting

-Lead the month-end and year-end closing process for the parent company and 3+ international sub-entities.

-Prepare and review Consolidated Financial Statements in accordance with IFRS/GAAP, ensuring all intercompany eliminations and foreign currency translations are flawlessly executed.

-Oversee global audit coordination and ensure compliance with international statutory requirements.



3. Operational Excellence & Oversight

-Supervise the Cost Management function to ensure manufacturing/operational costs are optimized and accurately reflected.

-Collaborate with the FP&A Manager to align historical accounting data with forward-looking budgets and forecasts.

-Ensure the AR and AP functions are operating at scale, maintaining healthy cash flow and vendor/client relationships.



4. Systems & Internal Controls

-Maintain and improve internal control frameworks (SOX or equivalent) within a large-scale ERP environment (SAP, Oracle, etc.).

-Drive continuous process improvement to handle increasing transaction volumes and organizational complexity.



Qualifications & Requirements

-Experience: Minimum of 10+ years of progressive accounting experience, with at least 3 years in a Senior Management role within a large corporate environment or a Big 4 accounting firm.



-Scale Mastery: Proven track record of managing accounting for organizations with significant revenue and complex departmental structures. Experience in small-to-mid-sized firms alone will not be sufficient for this role.



-Technical Expertise: Expert-level knowledge of Consolidated Financial Statements and multi-currency reporting.



-Education: Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or Finance; CPA or CMA certification is highly preferred.



-Systems: Advanced proficiency in Tier-1 ERP systems (SAP S/4HANA, Oracle EBS) and consolidation software.



-Leadership: Demonstrated ability to manage other managers and influence stakeholders at the executive level.

title: Virtual Finance Manager (Property Management) UK
description:
Job Title: Accounts & KPI Manager (Property Management)

Job Overview



We are a UK-based property management and lettings company looking for a highly organised and detail-driven Accounts & KPI Manager to take full ownership of our financial processes.



This role is not just bookkeeping — you will be responsible for ensuring all financial data is accurate, reconciled across multiple systems, and that the business has clear visibility on performance through KPI reporting.



Key Responsibilities

Full reconciliation of accounts across Xero and our internal property management CRM

Ensuring all income and expenditure is correctly recorded, allocated, and matched across systems

Identifying and resolving discrepancies quickly and efficiently

Chasing internal team members for missing information, invoices, or supporting documents

Making sure all costs are correctly allocated and cross-charged to the correct properties, landlords, or projects

Monitoring rent payments, contractor invoices, and management fees

Producing regular financial reports and KPI dashboards for management

Highlighting issues, trends, or inefficiencies within the business

Assisting in improving internal financial processes and accountability

Key Skills & Experience

Strong experience using Xero (essential)

Proven experience in account reconciliation across multiple systems

High level of attention to detail — accuracy is critical in this role

Confident in chasing teams and holding people accountable for missing information

Strong understanding of financial reporting and KPIs

Experience in property management or real estate (preferred but not essential)

Excellent organisational and communication skills

Ability to work independently and take ownership of tasks

What We’re Looking For

Someone who takes full ownership of the accounts function

A problem-solver who can identify and fix issues, not just report them

A proactive individual who will improve systems and processes over time

Someone who is comfortable working with multiple systems and large volumes of transactions

Important



This role requires someone who is highly detail-oriented and persistent. You will be expected to follow up with team members to ensure all financial information is complete and accurate — no loose ends.



Bonus Skills (Not Essential)

Experience with property management software

KPI dashboard creation (Excel, Google Sheets, or reporting tools)

Understanding of UK property accounting (rent, deposits, contractor costs)

title: Looking for freelancers to create short how-to videos on online tools/software
description:
Hi everyone,



I’m currently looking for multiple freelancers to create short how-to / explainer videos for YouTube. I’m already working with a small team and looking to bring on several more people to increase output.



This is a simple screen-recording role where you explain how to do something step by step throughout the entire video.



We work with many different tools and software, some examples of tools and topics other freelancers have covered are:

- Canva: How to add a shadow to an image in Canva

- Shopify: How to add products in Shopify

- Mailchimp: How to find campaign ID in Mailchimp



There are thousands of topics available, and this is intended to be long-term, ongoing work.



How the workflow works:

- You will be assigned one software at a time (e.g. 
, Airtable, Asana, Klaviyo, etc.)

- You may need to spend some time familiarising yourself with that software before creating tutorials

- Each software includes a list of approximately 100 to 500 tutorial topics

- Your role is to work through as many topics as possible, ideally completing the full list

- Once finished, you will be assigned a new software and repeat the process



What the work involves:

- Recording short tutorials (usually 1–4 minutes, sometimes longer)

- Explaining clearly while navigating the software

- Basic editing (cutting mistakes, trimming pauses)

- Creating a simple thumbnail using a provided template I've created in Canva (quick and easy, mostly adding text)



Requirements:

- English fluency (minimum intermediate level) - this role is not suitable for freelancers with broken or difficult-to-understand English

- Clear audio quality

- A decent microphone with minimal background noise (noise reduction tools are fine, I recommend Krisp, SteelseriesGG, or Nvidia Broadcast for background noise removal)

- Ability to explain clearly and naturally (sounding confident is great!)

- Reliable and consistent, able to meet deadlines and communicate properly



Pay:

- $1 per approved video

- No cap on output

- You can produce 30 videos or 300 videos per week, completely up to you how many videos you want to create

- Please include how many videos you think you can produce weekly in your application



Time expectations (for transparency):

These are simple videos. Once you are familiar with the process, it is realistic to produce around 8-10 completed videos per hour (approximately $8-10 per hour), depending on tutorial lenght and complexity.



How to apply:

Please send a short sample how-to video created by you.



- It can be simple (e.g. how to change your desktop background)

- A more complex tutorial is preferred if possible

- Attach the file or send a Google Drive link (make sure it is set to public)



This will be used to evaluate:

- Your English level

- Your clarity when explaining

- Your on-screen presentation



Please do not apply with irrelevant video samples. I am not looking for a video editor, I am looking for freelancers to create screen recorded how-to tutorials, so please refrain from sending your video editing portfolio as this is not what I am looking for.

- Copy

- Structure



Your job is execution. Nothing more, nothing less.



REQUIRED:



- WordPress

- Elementor

- Ability to follow instructions exactly

- Ability to move fast without breaking things



BONUS (not required):



- Basic HTML/CSS

- Experience rebuilding pages from screenshots



IMPORTANT:



Most people overthink this. I don’t want that.



I want someone who:

- Gets it done

- Matches layouts closely

- Doesn’t disappear

- Communicates clearly



PAY:



- Project-based or hourly

- Ongoing work for the right person



TO APPLY:



Send:



1. Links to pages you have BUILT (not designed)

2. What AI tools you use

3. How fast you can complete a 1-page build

4. Put the word BUILDER at the top of your message



If you miss that, I won’t respond.



DO NOT APPLY IF:



- You want creative control

- You don’t use Elementor

- You need constant direction



This is simple work for the right person.

If that’s you, apply.



Top applicants will be given a small paid test.

s

title: Part-Time Marketing Ambassador - AI Training Program (Remote)
description:
OVERVIEW

We are AgenticReady/VA, a US-based training company launching our first

cohort on Saturday May 23, 2026. We train virtual assistants on the AI

tools US agencies are now hiring for — Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot,

and Perplexity. Graduates earn the AR/VA Operator credential.



We are hiring 5–10 part-time Marketing Ambassadors to help us spread

the word in VA and freelancer communities ahead of the launch.



WORK SCHEDULE

- 10–15 hours per week (you choose your own hours)

- Work-from-home, no fixed schedule

- Engagement runs through May 22, 2026



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

- Share your unique referral link in VA
 groups and online

  communities you are already a member of

- Post organic content about the program on your social media

  
, TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn) using templates we provide

- Reply to comments and DMs from people interested in the program

- Direct interested VAs to your referral link to enroll

- Submit a short weekly activity update to your point of contact



QUALIFICATIONS

- Currently working as a VA, freelancer, or in a related online role

- Member of at least 5 active
 groups for VAs, freelancers,

  or remote workers

- Confident posting on social media and answering basic questions

- Good written English

- Reliable internet and a smartphone or laptop

- Self-starter who can work independently with minimal supervision

- Available to work consistently between now and May 22, 2026



PREFERRED (NICE TO HAVE)

- Active TikTok or Instagram account with a VA / remote work audience

- Past experience as a brand ambassador, affiliate marketer,

  or community manager

- Comfortable on camera (for short-form video promotion)



CODE OF CONDUCT

We have a strict no-spam policy. Ambassadors must follow these rules:

- No mass DMs to strangers

- No posting in groups where promotional content is not allowed

- No false claims about job placement, income guarantees, or

  free training

- No use of fake accounts or multiple identities

- Honest, organic outreach only

Violations result in immediate removal from the program.



HOW TO APPLY

Please submit the following:



1. A 60-second video introduction (vertical phone video is acceptable)

   covering:

   - Your name and where you are based

   - A brief description of your VA or online work experience

   - Which
 groups or online communities you are active in

     (names only, no links needed)

   - Why you would be a good fit for this role



2. Your Wise or PayPal
 address (for payout setup, only if hired)



3. Your availability over the next 3 weeks



Submit via the apply button on this listing. We respond to qualified

applicants within 48 hours.



We are hiring on a rolling basis and starting onboarding immediately.

The earlier you apply and onboard, the more earning opportunity you

have before the cohort closes on May 22.

title: Salesforce Automation tester
description:
Job description:



Job Title: Automation Tester for Salesforce



Location: Philippines / Remote



Working Hours: Part-time, Permanent, Fully flexible anytime







About Application House:



Application House is a Salesforce consulting agency that operates three different business models consulting, product development and support.

We are truly reflecting the name House of the Application. We are developing a very advanced Application/Product that includes an Artificial Intelligence App including LLM hosted services, products like Uber, GCash, Grab, SMS/WhatsApp Messaging App, Fundraising & Payment App, etc.

Are you excited to join a brilliant, intelligent team? Then why wait? Go ahead and apply the role.





Role Overview



The Automation Tester will design, develop, and maintain automated test scripts for Application House’s Salesforce products using UTAM (UI Test Automation Model), Selenium WebDriver, and other automation test frameworks.

The tester will ensure end-to-end regression coverage for Lightning components, LWC-based UIs, and Salesforce UI, supporting CI/CD quality gates on the Salesforce platform.

This role involves working closely with developers, admins, and product managers to ensure that every release meets Application House’s high standards for reliability, performance, and user experience.





Key Responsibilities:



Design and develop automated UI tests using UTAM, Selenium, and other supported Salesforce automation frameworks.

Develop and maintain end-to-end regression suites for Salesforce managed packages (Lightning Web Components, Apex Controllers, Triggers, Flows).

Build data-driven test scripts for multiple Salesforce org environments (sandbox, UAT, production).

Integrate test execution within CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions / Bitbucket / Jenkins).

Collaborate with developers to identify automation candidates during sprint planning.

Maintain automation codebase, modular test models, and reusable components.

Log, track, and verify defects in Jira, working with developers for resolution.

Support cross-browser and device testing (Chrome, Edge, Firefox).

Ensure positive/negative test coverage for Lightning Record Pages and Salesforce UI.

Prepare test documentation: automation scripts, test data setup, test reports, and coverage metrics.

Contribute to manual-to-automation transition, reducing regression testing effort.

Stay current with Salesforce test automation tools, particularly UTAM, Provar, and Salesforce Testing Frameworks.





Required Skills & Experience



2–3 years of experience in software testing, including automation testing.

Hands-on with UTAM, Selenium, WebDriverIO, or Provar.

Good understanding of Salesforce data model, custom objects, triggers, flows, and Lightning pages.

Strong knowledge of JavaScript or Java for automation scripting.

Familiarity with CI/CD and version control tools (Git, Jenkins, Bitbucket).

Proficient in using Test Management tools (Jira, TestRail).

Excellent analytical, debugging, and problem-solving skills.

Ability to work collaboratively in Agile/Scrum environments.





Preferred Qualifications:



Salesforce Certified Administrator or Platform App Builder (advantageous).

Experience testing Salesforce projects.

Knowledge of Salesforce DX, Scratch Orgs, and Packaging Automation.

Familiarity with Salesforce UTAM Page Object Model and JSON-based configuration.

Understanding of Salesforce Lightning Design System (SLDS) and UI selectors.





Tools & Technologies:



UTAM Framework (Salesforce official UI automation tool)

Selenium / WebDriver / WebDriverIO

Git / Jenkins / Bitbucket

Jira / TestRail / Confluence

Visual Studio Code with Salesforce CLI





Why Join Application House:



Work on real Salesforce AppExchange products used by global customers.

Exposure to Salesforce UTAM-based automation — one of the newest automation standards in the Salesforce ecosystem.

Collaborative global team (UK, India, Philippines) with continuous learning opportunities.

Competitive salary, flexible work hours, and performance bonuses.

Opportunity to grow into QA Lead or Salesforce Test Automation Architect roles.

title: Cold Caller - Remote (Real Estate)
description:
Job Title: Cold Caller (Disposition Focused – Real Estate Wholesaling)



Company: Homeward Partners – U.S.-Based Real Estate Investment Firm

Location: Remote (Central Time)

Employment Type: Full-Time (48 hrs/week)

Start Date: Immediate

Compensation: Base Pay + Commission + Performance Bonuses



How to Apply

Please share a 1–2 minute video introduction in English talking about your background, communication experience, and why you’d be a great fit for this role.

Drop your WhatsApp as well for Quick Communication.



About Homeward Partners

Homeward Partners is a rapidly growing U.S. real estate investment firm specializing in acquiring off-market residential properties and connecting them with cash buyers and investors.

We focus on efficiency, transparency, and results — delivering fair deals to sellers and profitable opportunities to investors.



About the Role

We’re looking for a Cold Caller with strong communication skills and a great U.S. accent to join our disposition team.

Your main responsibility will be to initiate contact with property owners, qualify leads, follow up with interested sellers, and assist in the deal disposition process — helping turn opportunities into closed contracts.



You don’t need prior disposition experience — if you’re confident, articulate, and eager to learn, we’ll provide all the training you need.



Key Responsibilities

Lead Generation & Qualification

Make outbound calls to property owners using company-provided scripts and tools.

Identify motivated sellers and qualify leads based on property condition, price expectations, and motivation level.

Accurately record call outcomes and update lead information in the CRM.



Disposition Support

Assist the disposition team in following up with warm leads and buyers.

Help schedule follow-up calls, send property details, and coordinate buyer communications.

Collect feedback from buyers and sellers to support faster deal closures.



Communication & Follow-Up

Maintain a high daily call volume with professionalism and persistence.

Develop rapport and build trust with property owners and investors.

Ensure all interactions are logged and categorized correctly in the system.



Performance & Growth

Meet and exceed weekly targets for call volume, lead generation, and follow-ups.

Participate in regular training and performance review sessions.

Grow into a Disposition Associate or Disposition Manager role based on performance.



Tools You’ll Use

Dialer: CallTools / BatchDialer / Mojo Dialer

CRM: ReSimpli / Podio / InvestorLift

Property Data: PropStream, Zillow, Redfin

Communication: Google Workspace, Slack

Reporting: Google Sheets, KPI Dashboards



Qualifications

Excellent spoken English with a U.S. accent (highly preferred).

Prior experience in cold calling, telemarketing, or customer service (preferred but not required).

Basic understanding of real estate wholesaling or disposition is a plus.

Confident, energetic, and motivated to hit performance targets.

Tech-savvy and comfortable using CRMs and dialer systems.

Strong communication, listening, and persuasion skills.

Ability to work during U.S. business hours (Central Time Zone).



Compensation & Growth

Base pay + attractive commission per closed deal.

Performance bonuses for top performers.

Paid training with hands-on guidance from the Disposition Team.

Clear growth path toward Disposition Associate ? Disposition Manager.

Long-term opportunity with a fast-growing U.S. investment firm.

title: Acquisition Specialist (Real Estate)
description:
Acquisition Specialist (Real Estate Wholesaling)



Company: Homeward Partners

Location: Remote (Central Time)

Job Type: Full-Time | 44–48 hrs/week

Compensation: Base Pay + Commissions + Performance Bonuses



How to Apply

Please share a 1–2 minute video introduction in English talking about your background, communication experience, and why you’d be a great fit for this role.

Drop your WhatsApp as well for Quick Communication.



About Homeward Partners



Homeward Partners is a fast-growing real estate investment firm specializing in acquiring off-market residential properties directly from homeowners. Our mission is to create win-win solutions — helping sellers achieve peace of mind while building strong, ethical real estate deals that create value for everyone involved.



We buy distressed, inherited, pre-foreclosure, vacant, or problem properties — always focusing on transparency, empathy, and integrity.



As an Acquisition Specialist, you are the first or second voice sellers hear from us — the bridge between their challenges and our solutions.



Your Mission



Your job is to connect with motivated sellers, uncover their real needs, and help negotiate win-win purchase agreements for our company.

You’ll represent Homeward Partners with professionalism, empathy, and drive — moving conversations from first contact to signed contracts.



Key Responsibilities



Seller Outreach & Communication

Call, text, and
 inbound/outbound seller leads.

Build rapport and trust through active listening, not pressure tactics.

Qualify sellers based on motivation, timeline, property condition, and financial situation.

Ask diagnostic questions to uncover challenges like inheritance, title issues, or foreclosure risks.



Deal Analysis & Negotiation

Evaluate property values using tools like PropStream, Zillow, or Redfin.

Analyze motivation and market data to make fair, strategic offers.

Negotiate purchase agreements that align with company goals while maintaining win-win outcomes for sellers.

Submit qualified deals to the Disposition Team with all relevant details and comps.



CRM & Follow-Up Management

Maintain consistent CRM updates for every seller conversation, note, and offer.

Schedule timely follow-ups for unconverted leads.

Track and report KPIs such as calls made, quality conversations, offers presented, and contracts signed.



Team Collaboration

Coordinate with the Disposition Team to ensure deal handoffs are smooth.

Share feedback and insights from sellers to improve marketing and acquisition targeting.

Participate in sales meetings, training sessions, and roleplays to sharpen skills.



Tools You’ll Use

CRM: ReSimpli or Podio

Dialer: CallTools, Readymode, Mojo, BatchDialer

Property Data: PropStream, Zillow, Redfin, ChatGPT (for comps)

Communication: Google Workspace, Slack, WhatsApp

Tracking: Google Sheets, KPI dashboards



Qualifications

1–2 years of experience in real estate acquisitions, cold calling, or high-volume sales.

Excellent English communication skills (verbal and written).

Strong negotiation and problem-solving skills with a focus on empathy.

Organized, detail-oriented, and consistent with CRM documentation.

Comfortable working full-time U.S. hours (Central or Eastern Time).

Tech-savvy and able to learn new systems quickly.



Preferred Experience:

Prior experience talking to distressed or motivated sellers.

Understanding of real estate transactions, contracts, and title processes.

Familiarity with DISC personality profiles and rapport-based communication.



Compensation & Growth

Base hourly rate (DOE) + generous commissions per closed assignment

Performance-based bonuses

Paid training and continuous support

Clear promotion path to Senior Disposition Manager / Team Lead

Long-term opportunity with a fast-scaling U.S. investment firm

title: Disposition Specialist (Real Estate)
description:
Disposition Manager (Real Estate Wholesaling)



Company: Homeward Partners (U.S.-based Real Estate Investment Firm)

Location: Remote (Central Time)

Employment Type: Full-Time (48 hrs/week)

Start Date: Immediate

Compensation: Base Pay + Commissions per Closed Deal + Performance Bonuses



How to Apply

Please share a 1–2 minute video introduction in English talking about your background, communication experience, and why you’d be a great fit for this role.

Drop your WhatsApp as well for Quick Communication.



About Homeward Partners



Homeward Partners is a fast-growing real estate investment company specializing in buying off-market residential properties and selling them to a curated network of cash buyers and investors. We focus on transparency, speed, and results — offering sellers quick, fair deals and investors high-value opportunities.



As our Disposition Manager, you’ll be responsible for turning signed contracts into closed deals — marketing properties, managing buyer relationships, negotiating assignments, and coordinating closings.



Core Mission

Your mission is simple: turn inventory into cash by selling contracts quickly and profitably while maintaining strong relationships with our investor network.



Key Responsibilities



Property Marketing & Buyer Outreach

Launch new deals to buyers within hours of contract execution.

Market properties using
 campaigns, CRM blasts,
 groups, Craigslist, and other investor channels.

Create engaging property listings and buyer packets with all key details (ARV, comps, rehab estimates, pictures).



Buyer Relations & Negotiation

Build, grow, and maintain a strong network of cash buyers and investor partners.

Negotiate assignment fees and contract terms that maximize company profit.

Follow up daily with buyers through calls, texts, and
s to create urgency and close quickly.



Transaction Coordination

Coordinate with title companies, escrow officers, and attorneys to ensure smooth closings.

Track deal progress, resolve title or buyer issues, and maintain clear communication across all parties.

Ensure accurate, compliant documentation for each transaction.



Market Research & Feedback Loop

Run comps using PropStream, Zillow, Redfin, and ChatGPT tools.

Stay updated on local market conditions, investor trends, and pricing benchmarks.

Provide insights to the acquisitions team for better property selection and pricing strategy.



Reporting & CRM Management

Keep CRM updated with all buyer interactions, notes, and statuses.

Track KPIs: time-to-market, engagement, contracts assigned, and closing ratios.

Generate weekly disposition performance reports for management review.



Tools You’ll Use

CRM: ReSimpli, Podio, or InvestorLift

Property Data: PropStream, Zillow, Redfin

Communication: CallTools / BatchDialer / Google Workspace

Marketing:
/SMS tools, Canva, ChatGPT,
/Craigslist

Tracking: Google Sheets, KPI Dashboards



Qualifications

1–3 years of experience in real estate wholesaling, dispositions, or investment sales.

Strong negotiation, relationship-building, and communication skills.

Confident with property valuation, comps, and real estate contracts.

Excellent written and spoken English.

Tech-savvy, detail-oriented, and capable of working independently.

Self-motivated and results-driven, with a passion for closing deals.



Preferred:

Existing network of U.S. real estate investors and cash buyers.

Familiarity with ReSimpli, InvestorLift, or similar CRM platforms.

Experience with
 marketing for real estate.

Compensation & Growth

Base hourly rate (DOE) + generous commissions per closed assignment

Performance-based bonuses

Paid training and continuous support

Clear promotion path to Senior Disposition Manager / Team Lead

Long-term opportunity with a fast-scaling U.S. investment firm

title: SENIOR FB ADS + Google ADS specialist 6+ Years experience
description:
About the Companies

Razzaque Paradise Properties are growth-driven companies operating in competitive real estate markets. We are focused on lead generation and acquisition, not vanity metrics. Our goal is simple: consistent, high-quality real estate leads that convert into deals.



We are looking for a top-tier Paid Ads Specialist with deep, hands-on experience in real estate
 Ads and Google Ads to take ownership of our acquisition funnel.



The Role

We are hiring an experienced Real Estate
 & Google Ads Specialist with at least 5 years of proven experience running paid acquisition campaigns in real estate.



This role is for someone who understands real estate buyer and seller psychology, knows how to build funnels that convert, and can optimize campaigns for cost per lead, cost per acquisition, and deal quality.



This is not an entry-level role. We want a strategic operator, not just an ad launcher.



Key Responsibilities

• Plan, launch, and scale
 Ads and Google Ads for real estate acquisition

• Build and optimize full-funnel campaigns (cold traffic ? retargeting ? conversion)

• Generate qualified buyer and seller leads, not junk traffic

• Continuously optimize for CPL, CPA, ROAS, and lead quality

• Write and test high-converting ad creatives, copy, and audiences

• Set up and manage tracking (Meta Pixel, Google Tags, conversions, events)

• Analyze performance data and make data-driven decisions

• Identify and fix funnel bottlenecks quickly

• Collaborate with internal teams to improve lead follow-up and conversion



What We’re Looking For

• Minimum 6 years of hands-on experience running
 & Google Ads for real estate

• Proven track record in real estate lead generation and acquisition

• Strong understanding of buyer/seller funnels and local market targeting

• Experience with high-spend accounts and scaling winning campaigns

• Ability to manage budgets responsibly and profitably

• Highly analytical, results-driven, and detail-oriented

• Self-starter who takes ownership and accountability



What Success Looks Like

• Consistent flow of high-quality real estate leads

• Stable and scalable acquisition systems

• Improved CPL and CPA over time

• Clear reporting and transparency on performance

• Direct contribution to closed deals and revenue growth



Why Work With Us

• Serious brands with real budgets and clear acquisition goals

• Long-term opportunity for the right performer

• Full ownership of the paid ads channel

• Results-focused environment (no micromanagement, no fluff)



If you are a real estate paid ads expert who knows how to drive acquisition—not just clicks—we want to hear from you.

title: Online English Tutor for Kids (K–2) | Fun, Conversational, Part-Time | $5+/hr + Bonuses
description:
Title: Online English Tutor for Kids (K–2) | Fun, Conversational, Part-Time | $5+/hr + Bonuses



Job Overview

We are a fast-growing English learning company helping young students (K–2) build confidence in speaking English.

We are looking for energetic, patient, and friendly English tutors who enjoy working with children and can create a fun learning environment.

This is a long-term opportunity with consistent students and growth potential.



What You’ll Do

Teach 1:1 or small group online English sessions (25–30 minutes)

Focus on speaking and confidence, not grammar-heavy lessons

Follow simple lesson structures (we provide materials)

Encourage students to speak, repeat, and express themselves

Provide basic feedback after sessions

Build positive relationships with students



Who We’re Looking For

We want tutors who are:

Friendly, energetic, and patient

Comfortable teaching young learners (ages 5–8)

Clear and easy to understand when speaking English

Reliable and punctual

Positive and encouraging



Requirements

Good spoken English (clear accent, easy for kids to understand)

Stable internet connection

Quiet teaching environment

Webcam and headset

Available for consistent schedule



Preferred (Not Required)

Teaching experience (ESL or kids)

Experience with Total Physical Response (TPR)

Experience using props, gestures, or visuals



Work Schedule

Part-time (10–30 hours/week)

Must be available during:

Korea peak hours (evenings KST)

Flexible scheduling based on student demand



Compensation

$4–$6 USD/hour starting

Performance bonuses based on:

Student retention

Parent feedback

Session quality



Why Join Us

Consistent students (no hunting for bookings)

Simple lesson structure (no heavy prep)

Supportive team

Opportunity to grow with the company



How to Apply (IMPORTANT)

To apply, please:

Record a 1–2 minute demo video teaching a young student (pretend if needed)

Introduce yourself (name, experience, personality)

Show how you would teach simple phrases like:

“Hello, my name is…”

“How are you?”

Include the word “CHATZO” in your application

Applications without a video will not be considered.

title: Remote Dispatcher (Transportation – Multi-Fleet)
description:
Company: Stride Hauling & K & S Transports

Location: Remote (Virtual)

Schedule: Part-Time (8:00 AM – 2:00 PM CST) with opportunity for Full-Time based on performance and business needs



Stride Hauling & K & S Transports is seeking a reliable and experienced Remote Dispatcher to manage daily operations for a growing transportation fleet, including tow trucks, dump trucks, and semi-trucks. This role is critical to ensuring efficient routing, timely service, and strong communication between drivers and clients.



RESPONSIBILITIES

-Dispatch and coordinate tow trucks, dump trucks, and semi-trucks in real time

-Assign jobs based on driver availability, location, and urgency

?-Communicate with drivers throughout the day via phone, text, or dispatch systems

-Schedule pickups, deliveries, and service calls

-Monitor routes, job progress, and completion times

title: US Tax Preparer & Bookkeeper
description:
Job Title: US Tax Preparer & Bookkeeper

Location: Remote

Job Type: Part-time

Starting Rate: $6.00/hour (Increase after 90-day performance review)



We are seeking a reliable, detail-oriented professional to join our growing team. If you have real experience with US tax preparation and QuickBooks bookkeeping and enjoy working in an organized, systems-driven environment, we encourage you to apply.



Overview

We are looking for a dedicated US Tax Preparer & Bookkeeper to support our accounting and tax operations. In this role, you will prepare individual and business tax returns, maintain accurate financial records, and help ensure clients’ books are clean and tax-ready year-round.

This position is ideal for someone who is accurate, dependable, and proactive, with the ability to work independently and meet deadlines.



Job Details

As a US Tax Preparer & Bookkeeper, you will manage tax preparation and bookkeeping tasks for multiple clients, maintain organized documentation, and support efficient workflows. Your work will play a key role in ensuring compliance, accuracy, and a smooth tax process for our clients.



What You’ll Be Doing

Tax Preparation & Compliance

Prepare Individual Tax Returns (Form 1040) and related schedules

Prepare Business Tax Returns (1120, 1120S, 1065)

Handle State and Franchise Tax filings

Review financial records to ensure accuracy and tax readiness

Identify missing information and communicate with the team as needed

Maintain organized digital tax workpapers and documentation



Bookkeeping & Financial Management

Perform bookkeeping using QuickBooks Online

Categorize transactions accurately

Reconcile bank and credit card accounts

Clean up and correct incomplete or messy books when necessary

Prepare monthly financial reports (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet)

Ensure books remain accurate and ready for tax filing



Data Entry & Administrative Support

Perform accurate data entry and document management

Upload and organize client files using consistent naming and folder structures

Track tasks and meet internal deadlines

Assist with administrative support related to tax and accounting operations



Systems & Process Improvement

Follow and help improve internal workflows and checklists

Create SOPs and process documentation when needed

Identify opportunities to improve efficiency or reduce errors



What You Bring to the Role

Proven experience preparing US individual and business tax returns

Experience with QuickBooks Online

Experience with TaxSlayer or similar US tax software

Strong attention to detail and accuracy

Excellent time management and organizational skills

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Preferred Qualifications

Experience handling Franchise Taxes

Previous experience working with a US accounting or tax firm



What You Can Expect

Starting rate of $6.00/hour

Performance review after 90 days with opportunity for a pay increase

Long-term position with growth potential

Stable workload and supportive team environment

Opportunity to expand responsibilities based on performance



About the Company

We are a growing accounting and tax services company focused on providing accurate, reliable, and efficient support to our clients. Our goal is to build a strong remote team that values integrity, accountability, and continuous improvement. We believe in long-term relationships and creating opportunities for team members to grow with the company.

If you have real US tax preparation experience and are looking for a long-term remote opportunity, we encourage you to apply.

title: Email Marketing Specialist — GoHighLevel (Champion Gym)
description:
About Us

Champion Gym is a martial arts and fitness facility in Grande Prairie, Alberta. We offer programs in BJJ (Jiu-Jitsu), Muay Thai, MMA, Boxing, Taekwondo, Kickboxing, Wrestling, Ninja Warrior, Yoga, and Fitness. We also run Birthday Parties, Events, and TCLA — a private school program. We're growing fast and need someone to build out our
 marketing system from the ground up.



The Role

We use GoHighLevel and have a contact list of approximately 9,000 people. Our member data lives in Gymdesk — including program enrollment, attendance, membership tier, payment status, and purchase history — all exportable to CSV and ready for import into GHL. We need someone to build the
 and SMS marketing infrastructure and turn this data into targeted, revenue-generating campaigns.



What You'll Do

- Import and structure member data from Gymdesk CSV into GHL

- Segment contacts by program, membership tier, activity level, and demographics

- Build lead nurture sequences for new inquiries

- Create re-engagement campaigns for cold and lapsed contacts

- Set up retention flows triggered by attendance drops and expiring memberships

- Write regular promotional
s (offers, events, class spotlights)

- Build SMS follow-up sequences tied to
 campaigns

- Track and report on open rates, clicks, and conversions weekly



Requirements

- Proven hands-on experience with GoHighLevel — specifically
/SMS automation and workflows

- Experience with CSV data imports and contact segmentation in GHL

- Strong English copywriting

- Comfortable building from scratch — not just managing existing campaigns

- Self-directed with minimal hand-holding needed

- Bonus: experience with gyms, fitness, or local service businesses; basic Canva skills for
 graphics and promotional assets



To Apply

Share 1–2 examples of GHL automations or
 campaigns you've built. Tell us in a few sentences what your first 30 days would look like setting up
 marketing for a gym with a 9,000-person segmented list.

title: Dispute Manager
description:
We are currently looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Dispute Manager VA who can help us deliver accurate, compliant, and effective dispute processing while maintaining an excellent client experience.

About the Company

We are a growing service-based company focused on helping individuals improve their credit profiles and overall financial readiness. Our goal is to create a structured, compliant, and supportive environment for both our clients and our team.



We value accuracy, communication, accountability, and consistency.



Responsibilities

As a Dispute Manager VA, you will:

Assist with onboarding clients and reviewing submitted documents

Monitor deadlines and ensure timely follow-ups

Requirements

To Apply, Please Complete the Following:

Complete the test task above

Include the word “GROWTH” in your application



Applications that do not follow these steps will not be reviewed.

title: Scriptwriter for NBA Themed YouTube Channel
description:
Are you a fan of NBA Classics? Larry Bird, Rodman, the 80s/90s when the game had real characters? Do you love writing AND know how to dig through the internet to find a 12-second clip from a 47-minute Barkley interview? You're in luck.

Please don't send a resume or cover letter. I don't care.

Here's what I care about:

? You've written for YouTube before, and you can prove it. Send 2–3 long-form scripts (40+ min) you've written, live on YouTube. Lead with anything that hit 100K+ views.

? You watch the NBA YouTube niche for fun. If you don't, this isn't the gig.

? You live and breathe AVD. Cold open, sag zones, sticky pockets, payoff timing — you should be able to articulate retention strategy for a 60-min video without me prompting.

? Researcher first, writer second. The scripts are interview-driven compilations. Every chapter is built from real quotes from real podcast/TV appearances — Barkley on Inside the NBA, Dominique on NBA TV, Payton on GP Show, Buck Williams from a 30-year-old broadcast. You hunt them down. Googling "Larry Bird trash talk quotes" doesn't cut it.

? Every clip with a timestamp. Non-negotiable. The editor cannot work off "insert Barkley clip here." Format:

CHARLES BARKLEY — FULL STORY

Source: 
 · 32:50–33:30

[transcribed quote]

Exact URL, exact in/out, transcribed quote underneath.

? Proactive. I won't micro-manage. You build the premise, the chapters, source the clips, and write the host V.O. that bridges them.

What a finished script looks like: chapter structure + host V.O. + sourced clips with URLs/timestamps + editor notes for placement and retention.

Let's see where this takes us.

title: 3D Car Modeler (Blender) — Grassroots Indie Racing Game
description:
About the Project



Grassroots Legends is an indie simcade racing game in active development, featuring 80s and 90s period vehicles across multiple disciplines (dirt track, rally, rallycross, road, and arena racing). Think beat-up everyday cars from that era, lightly prepped and sent wheel-to-wheel. The vibe is authentic grassroots motorsport, not polished GT cars.



The Role

We're looking for a part-time Blender artist to help optimize existing car models and contribute to the vehicle lineup. You'll be working closely with the creative director on a game that values authenticity. Knowing your Commodores from your Corollas, and basic motorsport understanding is highly valued.



What You'll Be Doing



Optimizing existing vehicle meshes (polygon reduction, LODs, UV cleanup) for game-engine performance

Maintaining visual accuracy on 80s/90s period cars across multiple racing disciplines

Communicating clearly with the creative director through revision rounds (English via discord or whatsapp)



What We're Looking For



Solid Blender skills with a vehicle modeling portfolio — show us real car work

Knowledge of 80s/90s cars valued, familiarity with grassroots/budget motorsport (dirt oval, rally, demo derby, etc.)

Understanding of real-time optimization: LODs, poly budgets, clean topology

Self-directed and reliable: This is a small indie project and we need people who take ownership



Nice to Have

Experience working on racing games or vehicle mods

Interior / cockpit design skills

PBR texturing skills



How to Apply

Send us: 

(1) a portfolio link with your best vehicle work, 

(2) background / interest in motorsport / cars, if any

(3) your expected hourly rate or typical rates per vehicle / optimization.



No portfolio = no consideration.

description:

About MadeEA.ai

MadeEA is a UK based AI consultancy. Our content engine produces short form and long form video for our AI agents, our coaches, our clients, and our founder's personal brand. We need a video editor who moves fast, tells stories with the edit, and uses AI tools to multiply output.



The Role

You will edit short form and long form video for MadeEA, the founder's personal brand, and MadeEA clients. You own the edit from raw footage to publish ready file. You ship multiple cuts a day, not one a week. This is a full time, long term seat.



What You Will Do

-Use AI video tools (HeyGen, Runway, ElevenLabs, Descript, Captions, and similar) to scale output.

You Are A Fit If

Bonus Points

title: Survey Fielding Manager – Opinion Research
description:
FOR APPLICANTS WITH HANDS-ON SURVEY PROGRAMMING AND FIELDING EXPERIENCE IN PUBLIC OPINION OR MARKET RESEARCH



Remote, (Eastern Time Zone)



Who You Are

You program survey instruments, manage the field, clean the data, coordinate with vendors, and keep projects moving on schedule. You've done this work hands-on at a research firm (not in an academic setting), and you're comfortable owning the technical execution of multiple projects at once.



You may be a fit if:

* You have programmed surveys in Alchemer, Qualtrics, or a comparable professional survey platform - and can set up skip logic, quotas, randomization, piping, and multilanguage surveys without hand-holding

* You've managed survey fielding from launch through close: monitoring quotas, tracking sample quality, and keeping projects on timeline

* You've coordinated with external vendors - panel providers, call centers, mail houses - and can manage those relationships independently

* You have experience with sample preparation: lists manipulation, deduplication, creating clean sample files, generating unique identifiers

* You are meticulous about data quality - you catch errors before they reach anyone else

* You take initiative, ask questions when something is unclear, and don't wait to be told what to do next

* You're comfortable jumping between multiple projects in a fast-paced environment

* You are proficient in Microsoft Office, particularly Excel and PowerPoint

* You can create basic graphics using AI, Canva, or Adobe tools



What you'll do:

* Program and test online surveys in our survey platform, including
 and texting campaigns, logic testing, and distribution setup

* Monitor and manage survey fielding: track quotas, sample quality, response rates, and project timelines

* Coordinate with external vendors - online panel providers, call centers, and mail vendors - and provide regular updates to internal project managers

* Prepare and clean sample files: create organized sample files, generate unique data fields

* Develop mail materials and coordinate with internal team and external mail vendors

* Perform data cleaning on survey outputs to verify data quality and integrity

* Code and analyze open-ended responses

* QC all deliverables: cross-check data sets, verify formatting, catch errors before client delivery

* Build charts, reporting visuals, and basic dashboards in PowerPoint, Canva, or Looker Studio

* Support the research team across the full project lifecycle



What we're NOT looking for:

Someone whose survey experience is limited to academic research or distributing simple online links



Required qualifications:

* At least one year of experience programming and fielding surveys in a professional opinion or market research setting

* Proficiency in online survey programming with a survey platform (tell us which ones you know well)

* Experience managing fielding for market research or public opinion research studies

* Experience with data cleaning and response monitoring

* Strong English writing, proofreading, and communication skills

* Bachelor's degree in marketing, political science, communication, business administration, or a related field



Preferred:

* Experience with SPSS, R, Wincross, or similar statistical/tabulation software



What we provide:

* A collaborative team

* A supportive environment where asking questions is encouraged

* Company-paid PhilHealth or HMO

* 13th month pay

* Paid time off



TO APPLY:

Send a link to your resume and LinkedIn profile. Also tell us:?

1. Which survey platform(s) have you programmed in, and approximately how many surveys have you built?

2. Describe one project where you managed fielding from start to finish - what was the methodology, and what did you personally handle?



Put Survey Fielding Manager in the subject line. Use 5 apply points.

I am Adam Probolsky. I will read your application personally. This position is available immediately.



About Probolsky Research: We are a Latina- and woman-owned market and opinion research firm working for corporate, election, government, and nonprofit clients.

title: Technology Lead

What You Will Do

title: Character Illustrator-Animator / AI Visual Producer — Short-Form Videos
description:
Prismiera is building an identity forward jewelry brand using AI influencers. We're hiring a remote creative-production specialist to create, curate, and refine expressive character segments of varying styles for short-form social video. 



We can train and provide guidance on the AI pipeline relatively quickly, but the artistic talent and execution ceiling we're looking for is not something we can teach. Bring the character literacy and taste, strong character judgment matters more than existing AI tool fluency. You do not need to hand-draw or animate every asset from scratch, but you do need enough character-art vocabulary to judge expression, gesture, silhouette, emotional clarity, and consistency.



This is not a generic AI prompt-operator role and not a traditional frame-by-frame animation role. You'll create, curate, and refine expressive characters using AI tools, reference pools, and light manual edits where needed. You'll generate motion from curated stills using AI video tools, time clips to narration, and deliver finished 20–60 second segments.



Emphasis on Character-focused visual segments where the character's expression, pose, gesture, and motion carry the emotional beat of the narration.



The actual job is visual judgment under abundant AI output — repeatedly steering, selecting, rejecting, refining, and sequencing AI-generated visual output so it matches our visual style, emotional tone, and character identity. In practice, this means you'll often be choosing the right image or motion take from many AI outputs. 



What you'll do



Create, curate, and refine expressive character and environment stills using AI image tools and reference pools

Make corrections or light hand edits where AI output misses (gesture, expression, silhouette)

Generate motion from selected stills using AI video tools (Seedance2, Kling — training provided)

Curate ElevenLabs voiceover. - Guidance provided.

Sequence and time motion clips against narration audio

Deliver finished segments for short-form social video

Keep recurring characters consistent across many pieces

Help build reference systems, style notes, and visual judgment language over time

Document what worked, what failed, and why — so the system improves



The style we want

We like character work with high emotional expressiveness — diverse emotional grammar from shoujo to shonen - virality native illustrated character storytelling.

The work should feel alive and artist-directed, not randomly generated.



You might be a fit if you



Have some visual substrate in character work — illustration, comics, animation, storyboards, VTuber assets, visual novels, AI character work, or another medium where expression and character consistency matter

Have work that shows strong character taste

Can recognize and articulate why a character expression, gesture, or pose works (or doesn't)

Can keep one character feeling like the same person across multiple pieces

Have strong judgment under abundant AI output.

Demonstrate execution discipline — you finish work, you iterate cleanly, you ship completed videos autonomously under pressure and shifting artistic demand.

Are curious about AI image and motion tools, even if you haven't used them extensively yet

Can time visual beats to narration rhythm

Understand short-form social videos and virality sense

Communicate clearly and work well async

Have audience-validated work (YouTube, ArtStation, webcomic, Patreon, indie projects, etc.) — bonus, not required



Note on AI-assisted portfolios: AI-assisted work is welcome, but we will evaluate your taste/execution of scenes, character motion and overall aesthetics.



You're probably not a fit if you



Are mainly a prompt operator with no character art vocabulary or judgment

Pick the flashiest AI output rather than the most emotionally accurate one

Cannot diagnose why a character feels off (eyes wrong, gesture stiff, expression cold)

Are a video editor without character personality literacy

Are a pure animator looking for traditional frame-by-frame work

Work mainly in hyperrealistic or cool-detached styles - we are looking for someone who has the capacity to adapt quickly to different styles and artistic mediums, not just hyperrealism or hyper stylized.

Want a one-off gig rather than a stable long-term creative partnership



Compensation

$800–$1100 USD/month full-time depending on portfolio, taste calibration, and trial performance. Higher long-term compensation available for candidates who can own the full character ? motion ? timing workflow with autonomous brand judgment.

Trial period prior to confirmed engagement. Tool access or tool allowance provided — you won't need to use your own AI video credits for production work.

Proactive raises as you prove out and scope expands. We're not looking for a one-off gig relationship — we're looking for a long-term creative partner who grows with the brand.

Hiring process

Portfolio screen. Send:



Portfolio link - your best work

Pieces that show expressive acting or emotional range (illustration, animation, AI work, comics, VTuber, etc.)

Motion or sequence sample if available — animatic, short edit, Live2D/VTuber motion, AI motion, storyboard sequence, or simple timed visual piece

Short note on your current visual workflow and how you'd approach learning AI image and motion tools

Audience metrics or self-published projects, if any (optional but useful signal)

Include the phrase "character-first" in your application so we know you read the full post

Use at least 7 apply points



Shortlisted candidates move into a paid two-week trial that may convert to a confirmed monthly retainer.

title: Design my backyard
description:
Hello,



I'd like to redesign my backyard to be nice, with paving, flowers, etc. It's very important that the budget for materials / labor is kept low, and if possible, suggest things that we can do ourselves even. Therefore, it's necessary that you research Amazon, home depot, and other stores to see what we can buy for cheap.



It's strongly preferred to be someone with a strong sense of aesthetic design, particularly with outdoors, and also has a good intuitive sense / can research the cost of materials, etc. An architect would even be best.



You can use AI to generate the concept images, and if you have design skills to do 2D layout and 3D design, that will be even better.



I'll pay for different parts completed, the first initial brainstorming and generic design, detailed breakdown of cost and materials, etc.
